Result: 在LIBERO-Plus上，抗扰动成功率从30.3%升至71.5%，语言忽视降低3–4倍，实体检索Recall@1从0.41升至0.71；在自定义歧义基准上，AUROC达0.81（vs. 0.52）、AUPR为0.79，歧义输入主动澄清率从0.09升至0.81且不影响明确任务成功率。

Conclusion: 显式验证的接地机制能有效提升VLA模型对指令的敏感性与歧义感知能力，验证瓶颈提升语言-动作互信息，GAC损失施加实体级InfoNCE约束，注意力熵实现校准的选择性预测。

Abstract: Vision language action (VLA) models enable generalist robotic agents but often exhibit language ignorance, relying on visual shortcuts and remaining insensitive to instruction changes. We present Prospective Grounding and Alignment VLA (ProGAL-VLA), which constructs a 3D entity-centric graph (GSM), uses a slow planner to produce symbolic sub-goals, and aligns them with grounded entities via a Grounding Alignment Contrastive (GAC) loss. All actions are conditioned on a verified goal embedding $g_t$, whose attention entropy provides an intrinsic ambiguity signal. On LIBERO-Plus, ProGAL-VLA increases robustness under robot perturbations from 30.3 to 71.5 percent, reduces language ignorance by 3x-4x, and improves entity retrieval from 0.41 to 0.71 Recall@1. On the Custom Ambiguity Benchmark, it reaches AUROC 0.81 (vs. 0.52), AUPR 0.79, and raises clarification on ambiguous inputs from 0.09 to 0.81 without harming unambiguous success. The verification bottleneck increases mutual information of language-actions, the GAC loss imposes an entity-level InfoNCE bound, and attention entropy yields calibrated selective prediction, indicating that explicit verified grounding is an effective path toward instruction-sensitive, ambiguity-aware agents.

</details>


### [642] [Perception Is All You Need: A Neuroscience Framework for Low Cost Sensorless Gaze in HRI](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09829)
*Mason Kadem*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种无需传感器和计算的低成本（低于1美元）纸板机器人框架，利用人类视觉系统对凸性的先验假设实现感知层面的凝视跟随，将观者的感知系统作为机器人的‘执行器’，从而规避隐私与成本问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有 gaze-following 技术依赖昂贵硬件（3万美元以上）、复杂算法和传感器，且引发隐私担忧；亟需一种低成本、零功耗、隐私安全的替代方案。

Method: 基于神经科学证据（分布式面孔加工网络、凸性先验、预测加工层级），设计凹形眼窝+手绘瞳孔的纸板机器人，反向利用人脑固有的凝视计算机制；提供开源模板与可更换眼插件，并界定其适用边界条件。

Result: 验证了仅靠几何形状与视觉先验即可在任意视角下诱发相互凝视感知；提出了可量产、可扩展、零隐私风险的儿童-机器人交互新范式。

Conclusion: 该框架将过去二十年人机交互中关于凝视的研究成果转化为可在大规模人群中部署的实用技术，为普惠型教育机器人开辟新路径。

Abstract: Gaze-following in child-robot interaction improves attention, recall, and learning, but requires expensive platforms (\$30,000+), sensors, algorithms, and raises privacy concerns. We propose a framework that avoids sensors and computation entirely, instead relying on the human visual system's assumption of convexity to produce perceptual gaze-following between a robot and its viewer. Specifically, we motivate sub-dollar cardboard robot design that directly implements the brain's own gaze computation pipeline in reverse, making the viewer's perceptual system the robot's "actuator", with no sensors, no power, and no privacy concerns. We ground this framework in three converging lines of theoretical and empirical neuroscience evidence. Namely, the distributed face processing network that computes gaze direction via the superior temporal sulcus, the high-precision convexity prior that causes the brain to perceive concave faces as convex, and the predictive processing hierarchy in which top-down face knowledge overrides bottom-up depth signals. These mechanisms explain why a concave eye socket with a painted pupil produces the perception of mutual gaze from any viewing angle. We derive design constraints from perceptual science, present a sub-dollar open-template robot with parameterized interchangeable eye inserts, and identify boundary conditions (developmental, clinical, and geometric) that predict where the framework will succeed and where it will fail. If leveraged, two decades of HRI gaze findings become deliverable at population scale.

</details>


### [643] [RoboLab: A High-Fidelity Simulation Benchmark for Analysis of Task Generalist Policies](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09860)
*Xuning Yang,Rishit Dagli,Alex Zook,Hugo Hadfield,Ankit Goyal,Stan Birchfield,Fabio Ramos,Jonathan Tremblay*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出RoboLab，一个面向通用机器人策略的仿真基准框架，旨在解决现有仿真评测中性能饱和快、泛化性测试不足的问题；通过构建120任务的RoboLab-120基准和系统扰动分析方法，揭示当前SOTA模型的真实泛化能力差距。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有仿真基准存在训练与评测域重叠严重、性能快速饱和、难以反映真实泛化与鲁棒性等问题，亟需更严格的评测框架来评估通用机器人策略在现实世界中的可迁移性。

Method: 提出RoboLab框架：（1）支持人工与大语言模型协同生成机器人/策略无关、物理真实且视觉逼真的场景与任务；（2）构建RoboLab-120基准（覆盖视觉/程序/关系三类能力、三个难度层级）；（3）设计受控扰动实验，量化策略性能及其对外部因素的敏感性。

Result: 在RoboLab上评测发现当前最先进模型存在显著性能差距；验证了高保真仿真可作为分析策略性能及其外部依赖性的有效代理；提供了细粒度指标与可扩展工具集。

Conclusion: RoboLab为通用机器人策略提供了更具挑战性、更贴近现实的仿真评测范式，推动从‘过拟合式成功’转向对真实泛化能力的严谨评估。

Abstract: The pursuit of general-purpose robotics has yielded impressive foundation models, yet simulation-based benchmarking remains a bottleneck due to rapid performance saturation and a lack of true generalization testing. Existing benchmarks often exhibit significant domain overlap between training and evaluation, trivializing success rates and obscuring insights into robustness. We introduce RoboLab, a simulation benchmarking framework designed to address these challenges. Concretely, our framework is designed to answer two questions: (1) to what extent can we understand the performance of a real-world policy by analyzing its behavior in simulation, and (2) which external factors most strongly affect that behavior under controlled perturbations. First, RoboLab enables human-authored and LLM-enabled generation of scenes and tasks in a robot- and policy-agnostic manner within a physically realistic and photorealistic simulation. With this, we propose the RoboLab-120 benchmark, consisting of 120 tasks categorized into three competency axes: visual, procedural, relational competency, across three difficulty levels. Second, we introduce a systematic analysis of real-world policies that quantify both their performance and the sensitivity of their behavior to controlled perturbations, indicating that high-fidelity simulation can serve as a proxy for analyzing performance and its dependence on external factors. Evaluation with RoboLab exposes significant performance gap in current state-of-the-art models. By providing granular metrics and a scalable toolset, RoboLab offers a scalable framework for evaluating the true generalization capabilities of task-generalist robotic policies.

</details>


### [644] [CableTract: A Co-Designed Cable-Driven Field Robot for Low-Compaction, Off-Grid Capable Agriculture](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09938)
*Ozgur Yilmaz*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为CableTract的新型电缆驱动式农田机器人系统，并构建了一个集成力学、能量采集、牵引力、田间几何、经济性、全生命周期CO₂及不确定性量化的统一分析框架，验证了其在能耗、土壤压实和离网运行方面的优势。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统农田作业中拖拉机本体移动耗能大，而现有新型农业车辆可行性研究缺乏多维度（机械、能源、经济、环境等）统一、可复现的分析框架。

Method: 构建了一个开源、原型无关的综合分析框架，整合悬链线电缆模型、传动效率链、基于协同设计农具库的随机牵引力模型、六地风光储小时级仿真、50块田地多边形覆盖规划、接触压强压实模型、含电池更换与全生命周期CO₂的贴现现金流经济引擎，以及20个输入参数的全局敏感性分析。

Result: 应用于协同设计的参考构型时，该框架表明CableTract在能量消耗、土壤压实控制方面具有优势，并具备潜在离网运行能力。

Conclusion: CableTract架构通过分离重型单元与轻量作业载荷，显著提升能效并降低压实；所构建的统一分析框架为未来农业机器人系统评估提供了可复现、多目标、高保真的新范式。

Abstract: Conventional field operations spend most of their energy moving the tractor body, not the implement. Yet feasibility studies for novel agricultural vehicles rarely tie mechanics, energy harvest, draft, field geometry, economics, life-cycle CO2, and uncertainty quantification together on a single reproducible code path. This paper builds such a framework and applies it to CableTract, a two-module cable-driven field robot. A stationary Main Unit (winch + motor + battery + harvester module) (MU) and a lighter Anchor module (held by helical screw piles) tension a cable across a strip while a lightweight implement carriage rolls along it. The heavy bodies stay on the headland; only the carriage enters the field. The carriage runs a 10-implement library co-designed for the cable architecture. This co-design is the paper's central analytical lever. The framework is prototype-free. It chains a catenary cable model, a drivetrain efficiency chain, a stochastic draft model fitted to the co-designed library, an hourly solar + wind + battery simulator on six sites, a polygon coverage planner on a 50-field corpus, a contact-pressure compaction model, a discounted cash-flow economics engine with battery replacement and life-cycle CO2, and a global sensitivity analysis on 20 inputs. An operating-envelope sweep and an architectural-variant comparison close the loop. The full implementation is open source. Applied to the codesigned reference, the framework yields energy, compaction advantages and potential off-grid operation.

</details>


### [645] [GPU-Accelerated Continuous-Time Successive Convexification for Contact-Implicit Legged Locomotion](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09993)
*Samuel C. Buckner,Purnanand Elango*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种新的接触隐式轨迹优化框架ci-SCvx，通过引入积分交叉互补约束，结合连续时间序列凸化（ct-SCvx）方法，在粗粒度时间离散下仍能准确捕捉接触事件，并支持粘滑摩擦与部分弹性碰撞建模；采用嵌入回溯同伦法的SCP求解策略，配合JAX加速与定制化凸子问题解析器，显著提升求解效率，在腿式机器人运动任务中验证了其物理一致性、低能耗与实时性优势。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有接触隐式轨迹优化（CITO）方法依赖精细时间离散以准确捕获接触事件，导致问题规模大、求解慢，且解质量受限于网格分辨率。

Method: 将连续时间序列凸化（ct-SCvx）扩展至CITO，引入积分交叉互补约束；建模基于最大坐标系的完整多体动力学（含粘滑摩擦与部分弹性冲击）；在SCP中嵌入回溯同伦法处理互补约束；使用JAX实现GPU加速，并开发自定义规范形式解析器以高效构建凸子问题。

Result: 在MuJoCo HalfCheetah模型上验证：ci-SCvx生成的扭矩轨迹在跟踪仿真中比MuJoCo MPC基线更节能且物理一致；求解速度较现有最先进SCP实现快一个数量级以上。

Conclusion: ci-SCvx在保证接触建模精度与物理真实性的同时，显著提升了CITO的可扩展性与实时性，为高动态腿式机器人运动规划提供了实用、高效的优化框架。

Abstract: Contact-implicit trajectory optimization (CITO) enables the automatic discovery of contact sequences, but most methods rely on fine time discretization to capture all contact events accurately, which increases problem size and runtime while tying solution quality to grid resolution. We extend the recently proposed sequential convex programming (SCP) approach for trajectory optimization, continuous-time successive convexification (ct-SCvx), to CITO by introducing integral cross-complementarity constraints, which eliminate the risk of missing contact events between discretization nodes while preserving the flexibility of contact mode changes. The resulting framework, contact-implicit successive convexification (ci-SCvx), models full multibody dynamics in maximal coordinates, including stick-slip friction and partially elastic impacts. To handle complementarity constraints, we embed a backtracking homotopy scheme within SCP for reliable convergence. We implement this framework in a stand-alone Python software, leveraging JAX for GPU acceleration and a custom canonical-form parser for the convex subproblems of SCP to avoid the overhead of general-purpose modeling tools such as CVXPY. We demonstrate ci-SCvx on diverse legged-locomotion tasks. In particular, we validate the approach in MuJoCo with the Gymnasium HalfCheetah model against the MuJoCo MPC baseline, showing that a tracking simulation with the optimized torque profiles from ci-SCvx produces physically consistent trajectories with lesser energy consumption. We also show that the resulting software achieves faster solve times than existing state-of-the-art SCP implementations by over an order of magnitude, thereby demonstrating a practically important contribution to scalable real-time trajectory optimization.

</details>


### [646] [Vision-Language-Action Model, Robustness, Multi-modal Learning, Robot Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10055)
*Yuhan Xie,Yuping Yan,Yunqi Zhao,Handing Wang,Yaochu Jin*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出STRONG-VLA框架，通过两阶段解耦微调（渐进式鲁棒性学习 + 清洁数据重对齐）提升视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型在多模态扰动下的鲁棒性与任务保真度，并构建包含28种真实扰动类型的基准，在LIBERO和真实机器人平台上验证了其跨架构有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有VLA模型在视觉损坏与语言噪声联合扰动下表现脆弱；传统联合训练方法导致鲁棒性与任务性能优化冲突。

Method: 提出STRONG-VLA：第一阶段采用难度递增的多模态扰动课程学习以渐进增强鲁棒性；第二阶段在干净任务数据上微调以恢复执行保真度；同时构建覆盖视觉与文本模态、源于真实传感器噪声/遮挡/指令错误的28类扰动基准。

Result: 在LIBERO基准上，STRONG-VLA显著提升多种VLA模型的任务成功率：OpenVLA提升达12.60%（已见扰动）和7.77%（未见扰动）；OpenVLA-OFT和pi0也获得类似或更大增益；真实AIRBOT机器人实验进一步验证实用性。

Conclusion: 解耦优化是提升多模态鲁棒性的关键路径；STRONG-VLA是一种简洁而原理清晰的鲁棒具身控制框架。

Abstract: Despite their strong performance in embodied tasks, recent Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models remain highly fragile under multimodal perturbations, where visual corruption and linguistic noise jointly induce distribution shifts that degrade task-level execution. Existing robustness approaches typically rely on joint training with perturbed data, treating robustness as a static objective, which leads to conflicting optimization between robustness and task fidelity. In this work, we propose STRONG-VLA, a decoupled fine-tuning framework that explicitly separates robustness acquisition from task-aligned refinement. In Stage I, the model is exposed to a curriculum of multimodal perturbations with increasing difficulty, enabling progressive robustness learning under controlled distribution shifts. In Stage II, the model is re-aligned with clean task distributions to recover execution fidelity while preserving robustness. We further establish a comprehensive benchmark with 28 perturbation types spanning both textual and visual modalities, grounded in realistic sources of sensor noise, occlusion, and instruction corruption. Extensive experiments on the LIBERO benchmark show that STRONG-VLA consistently improves task success rates across multiple VLA architectures. On OpenVLA, our method achieves gains of up to 12.60% under seen perturbations and 7.77% under unseen perturbations. Notably, similar or larger improvements are observed on OpenVLA-OFT (+14.48% / +13.81%) and pi0 (+16.49% / +5.58%), demonstrating strong cross-architecture generalization. Real-world experiments on an AIRBOT robotic platform further validate its practical effectiveness. These results highlight the importance of decoupled optimization for multimodal robustness and establish STRONG-VLA as a simple yet principled framework for robust embodied control.

</details>


### [647] [Natural Gradient Gaussian Approximation Filter on Lie Groups for Robot State Estimation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10057)
*Tianyi Zhang,Wenhan Cao,Chang Liu,Yao Lyu,Shengbo Eben Li*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出NANO-L滤波器，通过将流形滤波重构为高斯增量变量的参数优化问题，避免了传统方法在切空间中线性化带来的误差累积，并利用自然梯度优化和Fisher信息矩阵处理流形曲率，针对不变观测模型推导出协方差更新的闭式解，实验证明其在腿足机器人上估计误差降低约40%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于李群流形的状态估计算法依赖切空间局部线性化，导致估计误差累积，难以满足腿足机器人敏捷控制对精度的要求。

Method: 将流形滤波建模为高斯分布增量变量的优化问题，利用指数映射实现乘性更新，并设计基于Fisher信息矩阵的自然梯度优化算法；针对不变观测模型，结合李导数扰动模型推导协方差更新的闭式解。

Result: NANO-L滤波器在Unitree GO2腿足机器人硬件实验中，相较常用滤波器估计误差降低约40%，且计算开销相当；协方差更新具有精确闭式解，提升计算效率。

Conclusion: NANO-L通过避免线性化、引入自然梯度优化与闭式协方差更新，在保证计算效率的同时显著提升了李群流形上的状态估计精度，适用于高动态机器人系统。

Abstract: Accurate state estimation for robotic systems evolving on Lie group manifolds, such as legged robots, is a prerequisite for achieving agile control. However, this task is challenged by nonlinear observation models defined on curved manifolds, where existing filters rely on local linearization in the tangent space to handle such nonlinearity, leading to accumulated estimation errors. To address this limitation, we reformulate manifold filtering as a parameter optimization problem over a Gaussian-distributed increment variable, thereby avoiding linearization. Under this formulation, the increment can be mapped to the Lie group through the exponential operator, where it acts multiplicatively on the prior estimate to yield the posterior state. We further propose a natural gradient optimization scheme for solving this problem, whose iteration process leverages the Fisher information matrix of the increment variable to account for the curvature of the tangent space. This results in an iterative algorithm named the Natural Gradient Gaussian Approximation on Lie Groups (NANO-L) filter. Leveraging the perturbation model in Lie derivative, we prove that for the invariant observation model widely adopted in robotic localization tasks, the covariance update in NANO-L admits an exact closed-form solution, eliminating the need for iterative updates thus improving computational efficiency. Hardware experiments on a Unitree GO2 legged robot operating across different terrains demonstrate that NANO-L achieves approximately 40% lower estimation error than commonly used filters at a comparable computational cost.

</details>


### [648] [A Ray Intersection Algorithm for Fast Growth Distance Computation Between Convex Sets](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10058)
*Akshay Thirugnanam,Koushil Sreenath*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种高效算法，用于计算两个紧致凸集之间的增长距离（growth distance），通过将其转化为Minkowski差集上的射线交点问题，并利用内外多面体逼近迭代求解，具备可行性与单调收敛性，在机器人运动规划和刚体仿真中展现出优越性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 增长距离提供了一种统一衡量集合相交与分离的指标，相比最小距离更具普适性；现有方法在计算效率和适用性上存在局限，亟需一种高效、鲁棒的算法。

Method: 将增长距离问题转化为Minkowski差集上的射线交点问题，并通过迭代构造该差集的内、外多面体逼近来求解；算法保证原始与对偶可行性及单调收敛性。

Result: 所提算法在多种凸集基准测试中达到当前最优性能；开源实现已验证其高效性与实用性；成功应用于机器人运动规划与刚体仿真。

Conclusion: 本文提出的算法为增长距离计算提供了理论严谨且实践高效的解决方案，拓展了凸集距离度量在机器人学等领域的应用边界。

Abstract: In this paper, we discuss an efficient algorithm for computing the growth distance between two compact convex sets with representable support functions. The growth distance between two sets is the minimum scaling factor such that the sets intersect when scaled about some center points. Unlike the minimum distance between sets, the growth distance provides a unified measure for set intersection and separation. We first reduce the growth distance problem to an equivalent ray intersection problem on the Minkowski difference set. Then, we propose an algorithm to solve the ray intersection problem by iteratively constructing inner and outer polyhedral approximations of the Minkowski difference set. We show that our algorithm satisfies several key properties, such as primal and dual feasibility and monotone convergence. We provide extensive benchmark results for our algorithm and show that our open-source implementation achieves state-of-the-art performance across a wide variety of convex sets. Finally, we demonstrate robotics applications of our algorithm in motion planning and rigid-body simulation.

</details>


### [649] [MoRI: Mixture of RL and IL Experts for Long-Horizon Manipulation Tasks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10165)
*Yaohang Xu,Lianjie Ma,Gewei Zuo,Wentao Zhang,Han Ding,Lijun Zhu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种混合强化学习（RL）与模仿学习（IL）的新框架MoRI，通过动态切换IL与RL专家、离线预训练+在线微调、以及IL正则化RL策略，在复杂机器人操作任务中实现了高成功率、低人工干预和快速收敛。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有RL方法样本效率低、试错成本高；IL方法存在误差累积和分布偏移问题；而已有混合方法难以应对复杂操作任务。

Method: 提出Mixture of RL and IL Experts（MoRI），基于专家动作方差动态切换IL/RL专家；采用离线预训练加在线微调策略；对RL组件施加IL-based正则化以保障探索安全性并减少人工干预。

Result: 在四个真实世界复杂操作任务上，MoRI在2–5小时内微调即达97.5%平均成功率；相比基线RL算法，人工干预减少85.8%，收敛时间缩短21%。

Conclusion: MoRI有效融合RL的自主探索能力与IL的高效策略初始化优势，在保证安全性的同时显著提升复杂机器人操作的学习效率与成功率。

Abstract: Reinforcement Learning (RL) and Imitation Learning (IL) are the standard frameworks for policy acquisition in manipulation. While IL offers efficient policy derivation, it suffers from compounding errors and distribution shift. Conversely, RL facilitates autonomous exploration but is frequently hindered by low sample efficiency and the high cost of trial and error. Since existing hybrid methods often struggle with complex tasks, we introduce Mixture of RL and IL Experts (MoRI). This system dynamically switches between IL and RL experts based on the variance of expert actions to handle coarse movements and fine-grained manipulations. MoRI employs an offline pre-training stage followed by online fine-tuning to accelerate convergence. To maintain exploration safety and minimize human intervention, the system applies IL-based regularization to the RL component. Evaluation across four complex real-world tasks shows that MoRI achieves an average success rate of 97.5% within 2 to 5 hours of fine-tuning. Compared to baseline RL algorithms, MoRI reduces human intervention by 85.8% and shortens convergence time by 21%, demonstrating its capability in robotic manipulation.

</details>


### [650] [Device-Conditioned Neural Architecture Search for Efficient Robotic Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10170)
*Yiming Wu,Huan Wang,Zhenghao Chen,Ge Yuan,Dong Xu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出DC-QFA框架，通过设备条件化量化感知训练与硬件约束架构搜索，实现一次训练、多平台部署，显著提升异构硬件上视觉运动策略的部署效率与泛化性，并在多种策略骨干和真实机器人上验证了其加速效果与稳定性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有机器人操作模型高效方法存在设备与模型特异性、泛化性差、需耗时逐设备优化等问题，难以应对日益复杂的视觉运动策略与异构硬件约束。

Method: 提出统一框架DC-QFA，包含一个覆盖网络架构与混合精度位宽的超网，结合设备查表引导的延迟与内存感知正则化训练；针对各目标平台，进行一次性轻量级子网搜索；并引入多步在线策略蒸馏以缓解低精度下的误差累积。

Result: 在DiffusionPolicy-T、MDT-V、OpenVLA-OFT三种策略骨干上实现边缘设备、消费级GPU及云平台2–3倍加速，任务成功率几乎无损；真实Inovo机器人实验表明低比特策略仍能稳定完成接触密集型操作。

Conclusion: DC-QFA有效解决了异构硬件部署中模型效率、泛化性与稳定性之间的权衡问题，为视觉运动策略提供了可扩展、低开销、高鲁棒的量化部署范式。

Abstract: The growing complexity of visuomotor policies poses significant challenges for deployment with heterogeneous robotic hardware constraints. However, most existing model-efficient approaches for robotic manipulation are device- and model-specific, lack generalizability, and require time-consuming per-device optimization during the adaptation process. In this work, we propose a unified framework named \textbf{D}evice-\textbf{C}onditioned \textbf{Q}uantization-\textbf{F}or-\textbf{A}ll (DC-QFA) which amortizes deployment effort with the device-conditioned quantization-aware training and hardware-constrained architecture search. Specifically, we introduce a single supernet that spans a rich design space over network architectures and mixed-precision bit-widths. It is optimized with latency- and memory-aware regularization, guided by per-device lookup tables. With this supernet, for each target platform, we can perform a once-for-all lightweight search to select an optimal subnet without any per-device re-optimization, which enables more generalizable deployment across heterogeneous hardware, and substantially reduces deployment time. To improve long-horizon stability under low precision, we further introduce multi-step on-policy distillation to mitigate error accumulation during closed-loop execution. Extensive experiments on three representative policy backbones, such as DiffusionPolicy-T, MDT-V, and OpenVLA-OFT, demonstrate that our DC-QFA achieves $2\text{-}3\times$ acceleration on edge devices, consumer-grade GPUs, and cloud platforms, with negligible performance drop in task success. Real-world evaluations on an Inovo robot equipped with a force/torque sensor further validates that our low-bit DC-QFA policies maintain stable, contact-rich manipulation even under severe quantization.

</details>


### [651] [HECTOR: Human-centric Hierarchical Coordination and Supervision of Robotic Fleets under Continual Temporal Tasks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10892)
*Shen Wang,Yinhang Luo,Jie Li,Meng Guo*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种面向大规模机器人集群的人机协同调度与监督框架HECTOR，支持在动态不确定环境下，通过三层分层结构实现人机双向交互、滚动任务分配与团队内动态协调。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究忽视了操作员在动态未知环境中对机器人集群进行实时干预（如增/删任务、调整优先级）的需求与高效算法设计。

Method: 提出人本中心的HECTOR框架，包含三层：(I) 多模态人-集群双向在线交互协议；(II) 基于有限时域的已知任务滚动分配；(III) 执行中基于子任务检测的团队内动态协调；任务描述支持时序逻辑公式。

Result: 在多种时序任务与环境不确定性下，通过异构机器人集群的人在环仿真验证了该框架可提升计算效率并降低人工负担。

Conclusion: HECTOR实现了不同粒度与触发条件下的人机协同，兼顾自主性、适应性与可监督性，为大规模机器人集群的实际部署提供了可行方案。

Abstract: Robotic fleets can be extremely efficient when working concurrently and collaboratively, e.g., for delivery, surveillance, search and rescue. However, it can be demanding or even impractical for an operator to directly control each robot. Thus, autonomy of the fleet and its online interaction with the operator are both essential, particularly in dynamic and partially unknown environments. The operator might need to add new tasks, cancel some tasks, change priorities and modify planning results. How to design the procedure for these interactions and efficient algorithms to fulfill these needs have been mostly neglected in the related literature. Thus, this work proposes a human-centric coordination and supervision scheme (HECTOR) for large-scale robotic fleets under continual and uncertain temporal tasks. It consists of three hierarchical layers: (I) the bidirectional and multimodal protocol of online human-fleet interaction, where the operator interacts with and supervises the whole fleet; (II) the rolling assignment of currently-known tasks to teams within a certain horizon, and (III) the dynamic coordination within a team given the detected subtasks during online execution. The overall mission can be as general as temporal logic formulas over collaborative actions. Such hierarchical structure allows human interaction and supervision at different granularities and triggering conditions, to both improve computational efficiency and reduce human effort. Extensive human-in-the-loop simulations are performed over heterogeneous fleets under various temporal tasks and environmental uncertainties.

</details>


### [652] [ReaLiTy and LADS: A Unified Framework and Dataset Suite for LiDAR Adaptation Across Sensors and Adverse Weather Conditions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10213)
*Vivek Anand,Bharat Lohani,Rakesh Mishra,Gaurav Pandey*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出ReaLiTy框架和LADS数据集，通过物理建模与学习方法结合，实现LiDAR数据在不同传感器与天气条件下的真实、一致变换，提升跨域鲁棒性与仿真驱动感知研究基础。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LiDAR数据集缺乏同一场景下不同传感器配置和天气条件的物理一致观测，难以系统分析域偏移问题。

Method: 提出物理信息驱动的ReaLiTy框架：融合物理线索与学习模块生成真实强度模式，并基于物理天气模型引入几何与辐射退化；据此构建具有逐点对应关系的LiDAR自适应数据集套件（LADS）。

Result: 实验表明该方法提升了跨域一致性，并生成了逼真的天气影响效果。

Conclusion: ReaLiTy框架与LADS数据集为LiDAR自适应研究及智能交通系统中的仿真驱动感知提供了可复现的基础支撑。

Abstract: Reliable LiDAR perception requires robustness across sensors, environments, and adverse weather. However, existing datasets rarely provide physically consistent observations of the same scene under varying sensor configurations and weather conditions, limiting systematic analysis of domain shifts. This work presents ReaLiTy, a unified physics-informed framework that transforms LiDAR data to match target sensor specifications and weather conditions. The framework integrates physically grounded cues with a learning-based module to generate realistic intensity patterns, while a physics-based weather model introduces consistent geometric and radiometric degradations. Building on this framework, we introduce the LiDAR Adaptation Dataset Suite (LADS), a collection of physically consistent, transformation-ready point clouds with one-to-one correspondence to original datasets. Experiments demonstrate improved cross-domain consistency and realistic weather effects. ReaLiTy and LADS provide a reproducible foundation for studying LiDAR adaptation and simulation-driven perception in intelligent transportation systems.

</details>


### [653] [A Coordinate-Invariant Local Representation of Motion and Force Trajectories for Identification and Generalization Across Coordinate Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10241)
*Arno Verduyn,Erwin Aertbeliën,Maxim Vochten,Joris De Schutter*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种新的双上三角不变表示（DUTIR），用于提升刚体与交互力轨迹在不同坐标系下建模的鲁棒性，尤其缓解了传统坐标不变表示对噪声敏感和存在奇异性的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 刚体与交互力轨迹的建模需具备坐标系无关性，但现有不变表示易受测量噪声影响且存在奇异性（即表示不唯一）。

Method: 提出双上三角不变表示（DUTIR）及其计算算法，该表示在抽象层次上统一适用于刚体轨迹和交互力轨迹。

Result: DUTIR展现出对奇异性更强的鲁棒性，同时保持坐标不变性，适用于轨迹分割、识别与预测等任务。

Conclusion: DUTIR是一种通用、鲁棒的坐标不变轨迹表示方法，可广泛应用于机器人学、生物力学等领域。

Abstract: Identifying the trajectories of rigid bodies and of interaction forces is essential for a wide range of tasks in robotics, biomechanics, and related domains. These tasks include trajectory segmentation, recognition, and prediction. For these tasks, a key challenge lies in achieving consistent results when the trajectory is expressed in different coordinate systems. A way to address this challenge is to utilize trajectory models that can generalize across coordinate systems. The focus of this paper is on such trajectory models obtained by transforming the trajectory into a coordinate-invariant representation. However, coordinate-invariant representations often suffer from sensitivity to measurement noise and the manifestation of singularities in the representation, where the representation is not uniquely defined. This paper aims to address this limitation by introducing the novel Dual-Upper-Triangular Invariant Representation (DUTIR), with improved robustness to singularities, along with its computational algorithm. The proposed representation is formulated at a level of abstraction that makes it applicable to both rigid-body trajectories and interaction-force trajectories, hence making it a versatile tool for robotics, biomechanics, and related domains.

</details>


### [654] [Trajectory-based actuator identification via differentiable simulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10351)
*Vyacheslav Kovalev,Ekaterina Chaikovskaia,Egor Davydenko,Roman Gorbachev*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种无需扭矩传感器的基于轨迹的执行器辨识方法，利用可微分仿真从编码器数据中拟合系统级执行器模型，并在真实机器人任务中显著提升控制性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 高保真执行器动力学建模通常依赖专用测试台和扭矩传感，成本高、部署难；亟需一种仅依赖常见编码器数据的轻量、实用辨识方法。

Method: 将执行器辨识建模为轨迹匹配问题，通过反向传播优化可微分仿真器中的执行器与仿真参数；支持结构化参数模型与神经执行器映射等多种模型形式。

Result: 在真实机器人轨迹预测中，平均绝对位置误差从14.20 mrad降至7.54 mrad（降低1.88倍）；用于真实机器人运动控制时，行进距离提升46%，旋转偏差减少75%。

Conclusion: 仅用编码器数据即可实现高精度执行器建模，显著缩小仿真-现实差距，并有效提升下游策略训练效果。

Abstract: Accurate actuation models are critical for bridging the gap between simulation and real robot behavior, yet obtaining high-fidelity actuator dynamics typically requires dedicated test stands and torque sensing. We present a trajectory-based actuator identification method that uses differentiable simulation to fit system-level actuator models from encoder motion alone. Identification is posed as a trajectory-matching problem: given commanded joint positions and measured joint angles and velocities, we optimize actuator and simulator parameters by backpropagating through the simulator, without torque sensors, current/voltage measurements, or access to embedded motor-control internals. The framework supports multiple model classes, ranging from compact structured parameterizations to neural actuator mappings, within a unified optimization pipeline. On held-out real-robot trajectories under identical commands, the proposed torque-sensor-free identification achieves much tighter trajectory alignment than a supervised stand-trained baseline dominated by steady-state data, reducing mean absolute position error from 14.20 mrad to as low as 7.54 mrad (1.88 times). Finally, we demonstrate downstream impact in a real-robot locomotion study: training policies with the refined actuator model increases travel distance by 46% and reduces rotational deviation by 75% relative to the baseline.

</details>


### [655] [COSMIK-MPPI: Scaling Constrained Model Predictive Control to Collision Avoidance in Close-Proximity Dynamic Human Environments](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10358)
*Ege Gursoy,Maxime Sabbah,Arthur Haffemayer,Joao Cavalcanti Santos,Pietro Noah Crestaz,Vladimir Petrik,Nicolas Mansard,Vincent Bonnet*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出COSMIK-MPPI框架，结合MPPI控制、RT-COSMIK人体运动估计与Constraints-as-Terminations约束处理机制，实现无需大惩罚项或显式人体预测的安全碰撞规避，在仿真与真实机械臂实验中均表现出100%任务成功率与稳定低延迟（22ms），显著优于传统GB-MPC和普通MPPI。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于梯度的MPC在复杂环境避障中性能有限；采样型MPPI虽具灵活性，但依赖脆弱的惩罚项保障安全，缺乏形式化约束满足保证。亟需一种鲁棒、无需精确人体预测、且具备实时保障能力的预测式避碰方法。

Method: 将MPPI控制与RT-COSMIK人体运动估计算法集成，并采用Constraints-as-Terminations机制——将约束违反视为终止事件而非施加惩罚，从而实现硬安全性保障；整个框架不依赖显式人体轨迹预测或大权重安全惩罚项。

Result: 在仿真与真实7自由度机械臂上验证：COSMIK-MPPI实现100%任务成功率、恒定22ms计算耗时；在不可行场景下始终生成无碰撞轨迹，而普通MPPI失败；成功部署于带标记点人体运动估计的共享工作空间人机交互任务。

Conclusion: COSMIK-MPPI是一种鲁棒、顺应性强且实用的预测式碰撞规避方案，为扭矩控制机械臂在日常环境中实现安全人机物理交互提供了新范式。

Abstract: Ensuring safe physical interaction between torque-controlled manipulators and humans is essential for deploying robots in everyday environments. Model Predictive Control (MPC) has emerged as a suitable framework thanks to its capacity to handle hard constraints, provide strong guarantees and zero-shot adaptability through predictive reasoning. However, Gradient-Based MPC (GB-MPC) solvers have demonstrated limited performance for collision avoidance in complex environments. Sampling-based approaches such as Model Predictive Path Integral (MPPI) control offer an alternative via stochastic rollouts, but enforcing safety via additive penalties is inherently fragile, as it provides no formal constraint satisfaction guarantees. We propose a collision avoidance framework called COSMIK-MPPI combining MPPI with the toolbox for human motion estimation RT-COSMIK and the Constraints-as-Terminations transcription, which enforces safety by treating constraint violations as terminal events, without relying on large penalty terms or explicit human motion prediction. The proposed approach is evaluated against state-of-the-art GB-MPC and vanilla MPPI in simulation and on a real manipulator arm. Results show that COSMIK-MPPI achieves a 100% task success rate with a constant computation time (22 ms), largely outperforming GB-MPC. In simulated infeasible scenarios, COSMIK-MPPI consistently generates collision-free trajectories, contrary to vanilla MPPI. These properties enabled safe execution of complex real-world human-robot interaction tasks in shared workspaces using an affordable markerless human motion estimator, demonstrating a robust, compliant, and practical solution for predictive collision avoidance (cf. results showcased at https://exquisite-parfait-ffa925.netlify.app)

</details>


### [656] [AnySlot: Goal-Conditioned Vision-Language-Action Policies for Zero-Shot Slot-Level Placement](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10432)
*Zhaofeng Hu,Sifan Zhou,Qinbo Zhang,Rongtao Xu,Qi Su,Ci-Jyun Liang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出AnySlot框架，通过引入显式的空间视觉目标作为语言理解和控制之间的中间表示，解决视觉-语言-动作（VLA）策略在组合式语言指令下精确物体放置的难题；同时构建了面向槽位级精准放置的新基准SlotBench，并验证了方法的有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代单体VLA策略难以在组合语言指令下实现高精度（亚厘米级）的槽位级物体放置，且缺乏评估此类任务的专用基准。

Method: 提出AnySlot框架：首先将语言指令转化为显式的空间视觉目标（场景标记），再由目标条件化的VLA策略执行该视觉目标；采用分层设计解耦高层槽位选择与低层执行；并构建SlotBench仿真基准，包含九类槽位放置任务。

Result: AnySlot在零样本槽位级放置任务上显著优于扁平化VLA基线及以往模块化定位方法；SlotBench为结构化空间推理提供了系统评估平台。

Conclusion: 显式视觉目标作为中间表征可有效提升VLA策略在复杂语言指令下的语义准确性与空间鲁棒性，AnySlot为高精度机器人操作提供了新范式。

Abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) policies have emerged as a versatile paradigm for generalist robotic manipulation. However, precise object placement under compositional language instructions remains a major challenge for modern monolithic VLA policies. Slot-level tasks require both reliable slot grounding and sub-centimeter execution accuracy. To this end, we propose AnySlot, a framework that reduces compositional complexity by introducing an explicit spatial visual goal as an intermediate representation between language grounding and control. AnySlot turns language into an explicit visual goal by generating a scene marker, then executes this goal with a goal-conditioned VLA policy. This hierarchical design effectively decouples high-level slot selection from low-level execution, ensuring both semantic accuracy and spatial robustness. Furthermore, recognizing the lack of existing benchmarks for such precision-demanding tasks, we introduce SlotBench, a comprehensive simulation benchmark featuring nine task categories tailored to evaluate structured spatial reasoning in slot-level placement. Extensive experiments show that AnySlot significantly outperforms flat VLA baselines and previous modular grounding methods in zero-shot slot-level placement.

</details>


### [657] [PRoID: Predicted Rate of Information Delivery in Multi-Robot Exploration and Relaying](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10433)
*Seungchan Kim,Seungjae Baek,Micah Corah,Graeme Best,Brady Moon,Sebastian Scherer*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出PRoID和PRoID-Safe两种自适应中继决策准则，用于多机器人探索与信息回传任务（MRER），通过预测地图与信息交付速率优化中继时机，在真实室内场景中显著优于固定调度基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法忽略信息回传需求或采用无法适应环境、团队和任务动态变化的固定中继策略，难以在有限时间内高效完成探索与信息交付。

Method: 提出PRoID准则，基于学习的地图预测估计机器人沿规划路径的未来信息增益，并考虑队友已中继信息；进一步扩展为PRoID-Safe，引入机器人生存概率以增强故障鲁棒性。

Result: 在真实室内平面图数据集上验证，PRoID与PRoID-Safe均优于固定调度基线，尤其在故障场景下相对增益更显著。

Conclusion: 自适应、预测驱动的中继决策能有效提升多机器人探索与信息交付的整体效能，且具备良好的容错性。

Abstract: We address Multi-Robot Exploration and Relaying (MRER): a team of robots must explore an unknown environment and deliver acquired information to a fixed base station within a mission time limit. The central challenge is deciding when each robot should stop exploring and relay: this depends on what the robot is likely to find ahead, what information it uniquely holds, and whether immediate or future delivery is more valuable. Prior approaches either ignore the reporting requirement entirely or rely on fixed-schedule relay strategies that cannot adapt to environment structure, team composition, or mission progress. We introduce PRoID (Predicted Rate of Information Delivery), a relay criterion that uses learned map prediction to estimate each robot's future information gain along its planned path, accounting for what teammates are already relaying. PRoID triggers relay when immediate return yields higher information delivery per unit time. We further propose PRoID-Safe, a failure-aware extension that incorporates robot survival probability into the relay criterion, naturally biasing decisions toward earlier relay as failure risk grows. We evaluate on real-world indoor floor plan datasets and show that PRoID and PRoID-Safe outperform fixed-schedule baselines, with stronger relative gains in failure scenarios.

</details>


### [658] [VLN-NF: Feasibility-Aware Vision-and-Language Navigation with False-Premise Instructions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10533)
*Hung-Ting Su,Ting-Jun Wang,Jia-Fong Yeh,Min Sun,Winston H. Hsu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出VLN-NF基准，用于评估视觉-语言导航（VLN）智能体在面对错误前提（即指令中指定的目标实际不存在）时的鲁棒性；并设计REV-SPL指标与ROAM方法，以支持房间到达、室内探索与‘未找到’决策的联合评估与解决。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有VLN基准假设指令总是可行且目标必然存在，导致智能体无法应对目标实际不存在的错误前提场景，缺乏现实鲁棒性。

Method: 构建VLN-NF基准：利用大语言模型重写指令、视觉语言模型验证目标缺失；提出REV-SPL综合评估指标；设计两阶段混合方法ROAM，结合监督式房间导航与基于LLM/VLM及自由空间先验驱动的室内探索。

Result: ROAM在REV-SPL指标上优于所有基线方法；基线方法普遍因过度依赖指令而探索不足、过早终止。

Conclusion: VLN-NF填补了错误前提导航评估的空白；ROAM验证了分阶段、感知-推理协同策略对处理不可行目标的有效性，推动VLN向更鲁棒、可信的方向发展。

Abstract: Conventional Vision-and-Language Navigation (VLN) benchmarks assume instructions are feasible and the referenced target exists, leaving agents ill-equipped to handle false-premise goals. We introduce VLN-NF, a benchmark with false-premise instructions where the target is absent from the specified room and agents must navigate, gather evidence through in-room exploration, and explicitly output NOT-FOUND. VLN-NF is constructed via a scalable pipeline that rewrites VLN instructions using an LLM and verifies target absence with a VLM, producing plausible yet factually incorrect goals. We further propose REV-SPL to jointly evaluate room reaching, exploration coverage, and decision correctness. To address this challenge, we present ROAM, a two-stage hybrid that combines supervised room-level navigation with LLM/VLM-driven in-room exploration guided by a free-space clearance prior. ROAM achieves the best REV-SPL among compared methods, while baselines often under-explore and terminate prematurely under unreliable instructions. VLN-NF project page can be found at https://vln-nf.github.io/.

</details>


### [659] [Simple but Stable, Fast and Safe: Achieve End-to-end Control by High-Fidelity Differentiable Simulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10548)
*Fanxing Li,Shengyang Wang,Yuxiang Huang,Fangyu Sun,Yufei Yan,Danping Zou,Wenxian Yu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于可微分仿真强化学习的端到端策略，直接将深度图像映射为四旋翼的低层体速率指令，绕过传统规划-跟踪架构，解决了高速飞行中轨迹动态不可行的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法将四旋翼简化为质点模型并依赖外环控制器跟踪规划指令，在高速下易导致轨迹动态不可行且超出控制器能力。

Method: 采用可微分高保真仿真进行强化学习训练，直接从深度图像输出低层bodyrate命令；策略设计轻量、无显式映射、骨干网络、原语、循环结构、后端控制器或课程/特权引导。

Result: 在多个基准测试中成功率最高、抖动最低；零样本迁移到未见户外环境，达7.5m/s速度，并能在超密集森林中稳定飞行。

Conclusion: 该端到端低层控制策略有效克服动态不可行问题，提升鲁棒性与泛化能力，适用于全飞行包络。

Abstract: Obstacle avoidance is a fundamental vision-based task essential for enabling quadrotors to perform advanced applications. When planning the trajectory, existing approaches both on optimization and learning typically regard quadrotor as a point-mass model, giving path or velocity commands then tracking the commands by outer-loop controller. However, at high speeds, planned trajectories sometimes become dynamically infeasible in actual flight, which beyond the capacity of controller. In this paper, we propose a novel end-to-end policy that directly maps depth images to low-level bodyrate commands by reinforcement learning via differentiable simulation. The high-fidelity simulation in training after parameter identification significantly reduces all the gaps between training, simulation and real world. Analytical process by differentiable simulation provides accurate gradient to ensure efficiently training the low-level policy without expert guidance. The policy employs a lightweight and the most simple inference pipeline that runs without explicit mapping, backbone networks, primitives, recurrent structures, or backend controllers, nor curriculum or privileged guidance. By inferring low-level command directly to the hardware controller, the method enables full flight envelope control and avoids the dynamic-infeasible issue.Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed approach achieves the highest success rate and the lowest jerk among state-of-the-art baselines across multiple benchmarks. The policy also exhibits strong generalization, successfully deploying zero-shot in unseen, outdoor environments while reaching speeds of up to 7.5m/s as well as stably flying in the super-dense forest.

</details>


### [660] [AffordGen: Generating Diverse Demonstrations for Generalizable Object Manipulation with Afford Correspondence](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10579)
*Jiawei Zhang,Kaizhe Hu,Yingqian Huang,Yuanchen Ju,Zhengrong Xue,Huazhe Xu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: AffordGen利用3D生成模型和视觉基础模型，通过语义关键点对应生成多样化机器人操作轨迹，构建大规模、可泛化数据集，从而训练出在仿真与真实场景中均能实现零样本泛化和高成功率的闭环视觉运动策略。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代模仿学习在机器人操作中受限于几何变化导致的数据多样性不足，难以泛化到新物体。

Method: 提出AffordGen框架，利用3D生成模型和视觉基础模型，在大规模3D网格间建立有意义关键点的语义对应关系，生成新的操作轨迹；构建 affordance-aware 数据集，并用于训练闭环 visuomotor 策略。

Result: 在仿真和真实世界实验中，AffordGen训练的策略实现了高成功率，并支持对完全未见物体的零样本泛化，显著提升数据效率。

Conclusion: AffordGen通过融合语义可泛化性（affordance）与端到端学习的反应鲁棒性，有效缓解了模仿学习中因几何多样性不足导致的泛化瓶颈。

Abstract: Despite the recent success of modern imitation learning methods in robot manipulation, their performance is often constrained by geometric variations due to limited data diversity. Leveraging powerful 3D generative models and vision foundation models (VFMs), the proposed AffordGen framework overcomes this limitation by utilizing the semantic correspondence of meaningful keypoints across large-scale 3D meshes to generate new robot manipulation trajectories. This large-scale, affordance-aware dataset is then used to train a robust, closed-loop visuomotor policy, combining the semantic generalizability of affordances with the reactive robustness of end-to-end learning. Experiments in simulation and the real world show that policies trained with AffordGen achieve high success rates and enable zero-shot generalization to truly unseen objects, significantly improving data efficiency in robot learning.

</details>


### [661] [MonoEM-GS: Monocular Expectation-Maximization Gaussian Splatting SLAM](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10593)
*Evgenii Kruzhkov,Sven Behnke*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出MonoEM-GS，一种将前馈几何基础模型预测集成到全局高斯点绘（Gaussian Splatting）表示中的单目建图方法，通过EM框架稳定几何、ICP对齐估计位姿，并支持多模态特征驱动的开集分割等下游任务。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有前馈几何基础模型预测存在视角依赖性与噪声问题，导致几何不一致和帧间度量漂移，难以直接用于鲁棒单目SLAM。

Method: 提出MonoEM-GS：1）耦合高斯点绘与期望最大化（EM）框架以稳定几何预测；2）采用ICP对齐实现单目位姿估计；3）用多模态特征参数化高斯，支持原位开集分割等查询。

Result: 在7-Scenes、TUM RGB-D和Replica数据集上验证了MonoEM-GS的有效性，性能优于近期基线方法。

Conclusion: MonoEM-GS成功将噪声、视角依赖的几何先验整合为一致、全局、可查询的高斯地图，提升了单目建图的鲁棒性与功能性。

Abstract: Feed-forward geometric foundation models can infer dense point clouds and camera motion directly from RGB streams, providing priors for monocular SLAM. However, their predictions are often view-dependent and noisy: geometry can vary across viewpoints and under image transformations, and local metric properties may drift between frames. We present MonoEM-GS, a monocular mapping pipeline that integrates such geometric predictions into a global Gaussian Splatting representation while explicitly addressing these inconsistencies. MonoEM-GS couples Gaussian Splatting with an Expectation--Maximization formulation to stabilize geometry, and employs ICP-based alignment for monocular pose estimation. Beyond geometry, MonoEM-GS parameterizes Gaussians with multi-modal features, enabling in-place open-set segmentation and other downstream queries directly on the reconstructed map. We evaluate MonoEM-GS on 7-Scenes, TUM RGB-D and Replica, and compare against recent baselines.

</details>


### [662] [AWARE: Adaptive Whole-body Active Rotating Control for Enhanced LiDAR-Inertial Odometry under Human-in-the-Loop Interaction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10598)
*Yizhe Zhang,Jianping Li,Liangliang Yin,Zhen Dong,Bisheng Yang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出AWARE框架，通过无人机主动偏航增强LiDAR惯性里程计（LIO）在特征稀疏环境下的可观测性，提升人机协同空中测绘中的状态估计精度与安全性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 窄视场LiDAR在几何退化或特征稀疏场景下导致LIO可观测性下降、位姿漂移，威胁人机协同操作安全与测绘可靠性。

Method: 提出生物启发的全机身主动偏航框架AWARE，融合可微模型预测控制（MPC）与在线自适应强化学习（RL）调整成本权重，并引入安全飞行走廊机制解耦操作员意图与自主偏航优化。

Result: 在多种仿真与真实环境中验证了AWARE显著提升LIO估计精度、鲁棒性与飞行稳定性，同时保障HITL操作安全性。

Conclusion: AWARE无需额外机械装置即可扩展有效感知范围，为资源受限无人机在复杂环境中实现高精度、安全的人机协同测绘提供了新范式。

Abstract: Human-in-the-loop (HITL) UAV operation is essential in complex and safety-critical aerial surveying environments, where human operators provide navigation intent while onboard autonomy must maintain accurate and robust state estimation. A key challenge in this setting is that resource-constrained UAV platforms are often limited to narrow-field-of-view LiDAR sensors. In geometrically degenerate or feature-sparse scenes, limited sensing coverage often weakens LiDAR Inertial Odometry (LIO)'s observability, causing drift accumulation, degraded geometric accuracy, and unstable state estimation, which directly compromise safe and effective HITL operation and the reliability of downstream surveying products. To overcome this limitation, we present AWARE, a bio-inspired whole-body active yawing framework that exploits the UAV's own rotational agility to extend the effective sensor horizon and improve LIO's observability without additional mechanical actuation. The core of AWARE is a differentiable Model Predictive Control (MPC) framework embedded in a Reinforcement Learning (RL) loop. It first identifies the viewing direction that maximizes information gain across the full yaw space, and a lightweight RL agent then adjusts the MPC cost weights online according to the current environmental context, enabling an adaptive balance between estimation accuracy and flight stability. A Safe Flight Corridor mechanism further ensures operational safety within this HITL paradigm by decoupling the operator's navigational intent from autonomous yaw optimization to enable safe and efficient cooperative control. We validate AWARE through extensive experiments in diverse simulated and real-world environments.

</details>


### [663] [OmniUMI: Towards Physically Grounded Robot Learning via Human-Aligned Multimodal Interaction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10647)
*Shaqi Luo,Yuanyuan Li,Youhao Hu,Chenhao Yu,Chaoran Xu,Jiachen Zhang,Guocai Yao,Tiejun Huang,Ran He,Zhongyuan Wang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: OmniUMI 是一种面向接触丰富操作的多模态机器人学习框架，通过手持式统一接口同步采集视觉、触觉、力觉等物理信号，并结合扩散策略与阻抗控制实现高保真人机对齐的演示与部署。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有UMI类接口主要依赖视觉和轨迹信息，难以准确感知接触动力学（如触觉、抓取力、交互力矩），限制了接触密集型操作的学习效果。

Method: 提出OmniUMI框架：集成RGB、深度、轨迹、触觉、内部抓取力和外部交互力矩的同步采集；采用共享具身设计保障采集-部署一致性；引入双力反馈机制支持人对齐示范；扩展扩散策略以融合多模态观测，并通过阻抗控制执行策略。

Result: 在力敏感的抓放、交互式表面擦除和触觉引导的选择性释放任务中展现出可靠的传感性能与强下游表现。

Conclusion: OmniUMI 将物理 grounded 的多模态数据采集与人对齐交互相结合，为接触密集型操作学习提供了可扩展的基础。

Abstract: UMI-style interfaces enable scalable robot learning, but existing systems remain largely visuomotor, relying primarily on RGB observations and trajectory while providing only limited access to physical interaction signals. This becomes a fundamental limitation in contact-rich manipulation, where success depends on contact dynamics such as tactile interaction, internal grasping force, and external interaction wrench that are difficult to infer from vision alone. We present OmniUMI, a unified framework for physically grounded robot learning via human-aligned multimodal interaction. OmniUMI synchronously captures RGB, depth, trajectory, tactile sensing, internal grasping force, and external interaction wrench within a compact handheld system, while maintaining collection--deployment consistency through a shared embodiment design. To support human-aligned demonstration, OmniUMI provides dual-force feedback through bilateral gripper feedback and natural perception of external interaction wrench in the handheld embodiment. Built on this interface, we extend diffusion policy with visual, tactile, and force-related observations, and deploy the learned policy through impedance-based execution for unified regulation of motion and contact behavior. Experiments demonstrate reliable sensing and strong downstream performance on force-sensitive pick-and-place, interactive surface erasing, and tactile-informed selective release. Overall, OmniUMI combines physically grounded multimodal data acquisition with human-aligned interaction, providing a scalable foundation for learning contact-rich manipulation.

</details>


### [664] [LIDEA: Human-to-Robot Imitation Learning via Implicit Feature Distillation and Explicit Geometry Alignment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10677)
*Yifu Xu,Bokai Lin,Xinyu Zhan,Hongjie Fang,Yong-Lu Li,Cewu Lu,Lixin Yang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出LIDEA框架，通过隐式特征蒸馏和显式几何对齐，弥合人类视频与机器人操作之间的具身差距，显著提升机器人模仿学习的数据效率和分布外泛化能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器人学习受限于机器人演示数据稀缺，而人类视频虽丰富却因具身差异（视觉外观与3D几何）难以直接迁移。现有跨具身迁移方法依赖视觉编辑，易引入伪影。

Method: LIDEA包含两部分：1）2D视觉域中采用双阶段传递式特征蒸馏，在共享隐空间对齐人类与机器人表征；2）3D几何域中提出具身无关的对齐策略，显式解耦具身与交互几何，实现一致的3D感知。

Result: 实验表明：人类数据可替代高达80%的昂贵机器人演示；框架能成功将人类视频中未见过的模式迁移到机器人，实现强OOD泛化能力。

Conclusion: LIDEA有效 bridging 人类视频与机器人操作间的具身鸿沟，在数据效率与鲁棒性上取得显著提升，为规模化机器人学习提供了新范式。

Abstract: Scaling up robot learning is hindered by the scarcity of robotic demonstrations, whereas human videos offer a vast, untapped source of interaction data. However, bridging the embodiment gap between human hands and robot arms remains a critical challenge. Existing cross-embodiment transfer strategies typically rely on visual editing, but they often introduce visual artifacts due to intrinsic discrepancies in visual appearance and 3D geometry. To address these limitations, we introduce LIDEA (Implicit Feature Distillation and Explicit Geometric Alignment), an imitation learning framework in which policy learning benefits from human demonstrations. In the 2D visual domain, LIDEA employs a dual-stage transitive distillation pipeline that aligns human and robot representations in a shared latent space. In the 3D geometric domain, we propose an embodiment-agnostic alignment strategy that explicitly decouples embodiment from interaction geometry, ensuring consistent 3D-aware perception. Extensive experiments empirically validate LIDEA from two perspectives: data efficiency and OOD robustness. Results show that human data substitutes up to 80% of costly robot demonstrations, and the framework successfully transfers unseen patterns from human videos for out-of-distribution generalization.

</details>


### [665] [WARPED: Wrist-Aligned Rendering for Robot Policy Learning from Egocentric Human Demonstrations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10809)
*Harry Freeman,Chung Hee Kim,George Kantor*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: WARPED 是一个利用单目RGB视频合成逼真腕部视角观测的框架，通过视觉基础模型、手-物交互追踪与高斯溅射渲染，实现仅用单目数据训练机器人策略，并在5个桌面操作任务中达到与遥操作数据训练相当的成功率，同时减少5-8倍数据采集时间。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于人类示范的学习方法受限于多视角相机、深度传感器或定制硬件，且通常局限于第三人称或第一人称视角，难以扩展和降低成本。

Method: WARPED 使用单目RGB egocentric 视频，先用视觉基础模型初始化场景，再通过手-物交互管道追踪手和物体并重定向轨迹至机械臂末端执行器，最后利用高斯溅射（Gaussian Splatting）合成逼真的腕部视角观测以训练策略。

Result: 在五个桌面操作任务上，WARPED 训练的策略成功率达到与遥操作示范数据训练策略相当的水平，同时数据采集时间减少5-8倍。

Conclusion: WARPED 证明了仅使用单目RGB人类示范视频即可高效训练高质量 visuomotor 策略，显著降低硬件依赖与数据采集成本，提升了学习从演示中泛化的可行性。

Abstract: Recent advancements in learning from human demonstration have shown promising results in addressing the scalability and high cost of data collection required to train robust visuomotor policies. However, existing approaches are often constrained by a reliance on multiview camera setups, depth sensors, or custom hardware and are typically limited to policy execution from third-person or egocentric cameras. In this paper, we present WARPED, a framework designed to synthesize realistic wrist-view observations from human demonstration videos to facilitate the training of visuomotor policies using only monocular RGB data. With data collected from an egocentric RGB camera, our system leverages vision foundation models to initialize the interactive scene. A hand-object interaction pipeline is then employed to track the hand and manipulated object and retarget the trajectories to a robotic end-effector. Lastly, photo-realistic wrist-view observations are synthesized via Gaussian Splatting to directly train a robotic policy. We demonstrate that WARPED achieves success rates comparable to policies trained on teleoperated demonstration data for five tabletop manipulation tasks, while requiring 5-8x less data collection time.

</details>


### [666] [BridgeSim: Unveiling the OL-CL Gap in End-to-End Autonomous Driving](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10856)
*Seth Z. Zhao,Luobin Wang,Hongwei Ruan,Yuxin Bao,Yilan Chen,Ziyang Leng,Abhijit Ravichandran,Honglin He,Zewei Zhou,Xu Han,Abhishek Peri,Zhiyu Huang,Pranav Desai,Henrik Christensen,Jiaqi Ma,Bolei Zhou*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文揭示了开环预训练策略在闭环部署中表现不佳的根本原因，即观测域偏移和目标不匹配，并提出了一种测试时自适应（TTA）框架来缓解这些问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决开环（OL）预训练策略在闭环（CL）部署中效果差的问题，即OL-CL gap。

Method: 分析OL策略失败原因，识别出Observational Domain Shift和Objective Mismatch，并提出Test-Time Adaptation（TTA）框架来校准观测偏移、减少状态-动作偏差并保证时间一致性。

Result: TTA有效缓解规划偏差，在扩展性上优于基线方法；同时发现标准OL评估协议存在盲点，无法反映闭环部署的真实情况。

Conclusion: Objective Mismatch是导致OL-CL gap的主要结构性原因，而TTA是一种实用且有效的补救方案。

Abstract: Open-loop (OL) to closed-loop (CL) gap (OL-CL gap) exists when OL-pretrained policies scoring high in OL evaluations fail to transfer effectively in closed-loop (CL) deployment. In this paper, we unveil the root causes of this systemic failure and propose a practical remedy. Specifically, we demonstrate that OL policies suffer from Observational Domain Shift and Objective Mismatch. We show that while the former is largely recoverable with adaptation techniques, the latter creates a structural inability to model complex reactive behaviors, which forms the primary OL-CL gap. We find that a wide range of OL policies learn a biased Q-value estimator that neglects both the reactive nature of CL simulations and the temporal awareness needed to reduce compounding errors. To this end, we propose a Test-Time Adaptation (TTA) framework that calibrates observational shift, reduces state-action biases, and enforces temporal consistency. Extensive experiments show that TTA effectively mitigates planning biases and yields superior scaling dynamics than its baseline counterparts. Furthermore, our analysis highlights the existence of blind spots in standard OL evaluation protocols that fail to capture the realities of closed-loop deployment.

</details>


### [667] [Ro-SLM: Onboard Small Language Models for Robot Task Planning and Operation Code Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10929)
*Wenhao Wang,Yanyan Li,Long Jiao,Jiawei Yuan*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出Ro-SLM框架，通过知识蒸馏和LLM引导的奖励机制，将大语言模型能力迁移到小型语言模型（SLM），实现机器人端侧部署与可靠任务执行。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于大语言模型（LLM）的机器人系统依赖云端或高性能计算，难以在弱网、低算力平台（如无人机、小型地面车辆）上部署，亟需轻量、可嵌入的小型语言模型方案。

Method: Ro-SLM框架包含两阶段：1）利用LLM合成多样化机器人任务指令及对应真实场景代码（极小人工干预）；2）用该数据集微调SLM，并以LLM作为奖励函数指导训练过程。

Result: 在无人机操作任务实验中，Ro-SLM显著提升SLM能力——从完全无法支持任务规划与代码生成，提升至接近LLM性能水平。

Conclusion: Ro-SLM验证了在资源受限机器人平台上，借助LLM蒸馏与强化式微调，可使SLM实现高可靠性端侧智能决策与代码生成，为边缘AI机器人提供可行技术路径。

Abstract: Recent advances in large language models (LLMs) provide robots with contextual reasoning abilities to comprehend human instructions. Yet, current LLM-enabled robots typically depend on cloud-based models or high-performance computing infrastructure, which limit their deployment on robots under unreliable internet environments or with constrained computational resources, such as UAVs and small ground vehicles. Thus, deploying fine-tuned small language models (SLMs) that support onboard deployment offers a promising alternative. This paper introduces Ro-SLM, a framework that enables reliable SLM-driven robot operation by distilling LLMs' knowledge and reasoning. Ro-SLM starts from dataset synthesis by leveraging LLMs to generate diverse task instructions, produce corresponding ground truth code with minimal human assistance, and augment instructions into real-world application scenarios. Ro-SLM is then fine-tuned with the dataset, in which LLM serves as a reward function to guide the training. Extensive experiments on UAV operation tasks demonstrate that Ro-SLM improves the performance of SLM from being incapable of supporting robotic task planning and code generation to achieving performance that approaches LLM.

</details>


### [668] [Fast-SegSim: Real-Time Open-Vocabulary Segmentation for Robotics in Simulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10951)
*Xuan Yu,Yuxuan Xie,Shichao Zhai,Shuhao Ye,Rong Xiong,Yue Wang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: Fast-SegSim是一种基于2D高斯泼溅的实时、高保真、3D一致的开放词汇分割重建框架，通过精确瓦片相交和Top-K硬选择优化渲染流水线，实现超40 FPS渲染速度，并提升机器人导航成功率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有3D重建方法（如NeRF或高斯泼溅变体）难以满足机器人控制回路所需的实时推理频率，尤其在处理高维开放词汇分割特征时存在显著延迟。

Method: 提出Fast-SegSim框架，基于2D高斯泼溅构建端到端系统；核心是优化渲染流水线，包括Precise Tile Intersection减少光栅化冗余，以及Top-K Hard Selection策略利用几何稀疏性简化特征累积。

Result: 实现超过40 FPS的实时渲染；生成3D一致的开放词汇分割结果；用于Gazebo仿真平台作为高频传感器输入；生成多视角‘真值’标签，使物体目标导航任务的成功率翻倍。

Conclusion: Fast-SegSim在速度与实用性上兼具优势，有望弥合仿真到现实（sim-to-real）的鸿沟，推动开放词汇三维感知在机器人中的实际部署。

Abstract: Open-vocabulary panoptic reconstruction is crucial for advanced robotics and simulation. However, existing 3D reconstruction methods, such as NeRF or Gaussian Splatting variants, often struggle to achieve the real-time inference frequency required by robotic control loops. Existing methods incur prohibitive latency when processing the high-dimensional features required for robust open-vocabulary segmentation. We propose Fast-SegSim, a novel, simple, and end-to-end framework built upon 2D Gaussian Splatting, designed to realize real-time, high-fidelity, and 3D-consistent open-vocabulary segmentation reconstruction. Our core contribution is a highly optimized rendering pipeline that specifically addresses the computational bottleneck of high-channel segmentation feature accumulation. We introduce two key optimizations: Precise Tile Intersection to reduce rasterization redundancy, and a novel Top-K Hard Selection strategy. This strategy leverages the geometric sparsity inherent in the 2D Gaussian representation to greatly simplify feature accumulation and alleviate bandwidth limitations, achieving render rates exceeding 40 FPS. Fast-SegSim provides critical value in robotic applications: it serves both as a high-frequency sensor input for simulation platforms like Gazebo, and its 3D-consistent outputs provide essential multi-view 'ground truth' labels for fine-tuning downstream perception tasks. We demonstrate this utility by using the generated labels to fine-tune the perception module in object goal navigation, successfully doubling the navigation success rate. Our superior rendering speed and practical utility underscore Fast-SegSim's potential to bridge the sim-to-real gap.

</details>


### [669] [Diffusion Reinforcement Learning Based Online 3D Bin Packing Spatial Strategy Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10953)
*Jie Han,Tong Li,Qingyang Xu,Yong Song,Bao Pang,Xianfeng Yuan*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于扩散模型的强化学习算法，用于解决在线3D装箱问题，通过马尔可夫决策链建模、高度图状态表示和扩散模型驱动的Actor网络，显著提升了装箱效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在线3D装箱问题在物流、仓储和智能制造中至关重要，而现有深度强化学习方法存在样本效率低的问题。

Method: 提出扩散强化学习算法，采用马尔可夫决策链建模装箱过程，使用高度图进行状态表示，并设计基于扩散模型的Actor网络。

Result: 实验表明，该方法相比当前最优DRL方法显著提高了平均装箱数量，在复杂在线场景中展现出优异应用潜力。

Conclusion: 扩散模型可有效提升DRL在在线3D装箱任务中的样本效率和性能，为实际工业应用提供了新思路。

Abstract: The online 3D bin packing problem is important in logistics, warehousing and intelligent manufacturing, with solutions shifting to deep reinforcement learning (DRL) which faces challenges like low sample efficiency. This paper proposes a diffusion reinforcement learning-based algorithm, using a Markov decision chain for packing modeling, height map-based state representation and a diffusion model-based actor network. Experiments show it significantly improves the average number of packed items compared to state-of-the-art DRL methods, with excellent application potential in complex online scenarios.

</details>


### [670] [ScoRe-Flow: Complete Distributional Control via Score-Based Reinforcement Learning for Flow Matching](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10962)
*Xiaotian Qiu,Lukai Chen,Jinhao Li,Qi Sun,Cheng Zhuo,Guohao Dai*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出ScoRe-Flow，一种基于分数（score）的强化学习微调方法，通过调节流匹配策略中的漂移项（drift）并联合学习方差，实现对随机转移过程均值与方差的解耦控制，在多个机器人控制任务中显著提升收敛速度和成功率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Flow Matching策略在机器人控制中高效但受限于模仿学习数据质量；需RL微调以超越示范水平，而现有基于SDE的噪声注入方法效率低，因忽略示范已提供的强先验。

Method: 利用速度场导出分数函数（log-density梯度）显式调制SDE漂移项，并联合学习方差预测，实现均值与方差的解耦控制，无需额外网络。

Result: 在D4RL运动任务上收敛速度快于当前最优流方法2.4倍；在Robomimic和Franka Kitchen操作任务中成功率最高提升5.4%。

Conclusion: 分数驱动的漂移调制能有效引导探索至高概率区域，提升训练稳定性与效率；ScoRe-Flow为FM策略的RL微调提供了更高效、解耦且可解释的框架。

Abstract: Flow Matching (FM) policies have emerged as an efficient backbone for robotic control, offering fast and expressive action generation that underpins recent large-scale embodied AI systems. However, FM policies trained via imitation learning inherit the limitations of demonstration data; surpassing suboptimal behaviors requires reinforcement learning (RL) fine-tuning. Recent methods convert deterministic flows into stochastic differential equations (SDEs) with learnable noise injection, enabling exploration and tractable likelihoods, but such noise-only control can compromise training efficiency when demonstrations already provide strong priors. We observe that modulating the drift via the score function, i.e., the gradient of log-density, steers exploration toward high-probability regions, improving stability. The score admits a closed-form expression from the velocity field, requiring no auxiliary networks. Based on this, we propose ScoRe-Flow, a score-based RL fine-tuning method that combines drift modulation with learned variance prediction to achieve decoupled control over the mean and variance of stochastic transitions. Experiments demonstrate that ScoRe-Flow achieves 2.4x faster convergence than flow-based SOTA on D4RL locomotion tasks and up to 5.4% higher success rates on Robomimic and Franka Kitchen manipulation tasks.

</details>


### [671] [Ψ-Map: Panoptic Surface Integrated Mapping Enables Real2Sim Transfer](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10982)
*Xuan Yu,Yuxuan Xie,Changjian Jiang,Shichao Zhai,Rong Xiong,Yu Zhang,Yue Wang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种面向开放词汇泛视图重建的综合框架，融合了几何增强、端到端全景学习与高效渲染，在大规模场景中兼顾几何精度、全景一致性与实时性（>40 FPS）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于3D高斯溅射（3DGS）的方法难以在大规模场景中同时满足几何准确性、全景语义一致性与实时推理需求，制约了机器人感知与仿真应用。

Method: 1）利用LiDAR构建面约束多模态高斯混合模型（GMM），采用2D高斯surfels作为地图表示以实现高精度表面对齐；2）设计查询引导的端到端架构，通过视锥内局部交叉注意力将2D掩码特征直接提升至3D空间；3）引入精确瓦片相交检测与Top-K硬选择策略优化语义渲染流程。

Result: 在大规模场景中显著提升几何重建精度与全景分割质量，推理速度超过40 FPS，满足机器人控制闭环的实时性要求。

Conclusion: 所提框架有效解决了开放词汇泛视图重建中几何保真度、语义一致性与计算效率之间的耦合矛盾，为真实场景机器人感知提供了可扩展、实时、高保真的三维理解方案。

Abstract: Open-vocabulary panoptic reconstruction is essential for advanced robotics perception and simulation. However, existing methods based on 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) often struggle to simultaneously achieve geometric accuracy, coherent panoptic understanding, and real-time inference frequency in large-scale scenes. In this paper, we propose a comprehensive framework that integrates geometric reinforcement, end-to-end panoptic learning, and efficient rendering. First, to ensure physical realism in large-scale environments, we leverage LiDAR data to construct plane-constrained multimodal Gaussian Mixture Models (GMMs) and employ 2D Gaussian surfels as the map representation, enabling high-precision surface alignment and continuous geometric supervision. Building upon this, to overcome the error accumulation and cumbersome cross-frame association inherent in traditional multi-stage panoptic segmentation pipelines, we design a query-guided end-to-end learning architecture. By utilizing a local cross-attention mechanism within the view frustum, the system lifts 2D mask features directly into 3D space, achieving globally consistent panoptic understanding. Finally, addressing the computational bottlenecks caused by high-dimensional semantic features, we introduce Precise Tile Intersection and a Top-K Hard Selection strategy to optimize the rendering pipeline. Experimental results demonstrate that our system achieves superior geometric and panoptic reconstruction quality in large-scale scenes while maintaining an inference rate exceeding 40 FPS, meeting the real-time requirements of robotic control loops.

</details>


### [672] [Inferring World Belief States in Dynamic Real-World Environments](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11020)
*Jack Kolb,Aditya Garg,Nikolai Warner,Karen M. Feigh*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种在动态、三维、部分可观测环境中，基于机器人观测估计人类世界信念状态的方法，依托心理模型理论，实现了对人类队友一级态势感知（即信念状态）的推断，并在仿真与真实机器人平台上验证了其有效性，还展示了其在主动辅助语义推理任务中的下游应用。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 人类与机器人协同时需要理解队友的信念和能力（即团队心理模型），以实现无需频繁显式通信的流畅协作；然而，在动态3D部分可观测环境中实时估计人类的世界信念状态仍具挑战。

Method: 基于心理模型理论，构建可从机器人观测中推断人类队友信念状态（即一级态势感知）的计算方法，并在仿真环境和真实机器人平台上进行实现与验证。

Result: 成功在逼真仿真环境中推断人类队友信念状态，迁移至真实机器人平台，并应用于主动辅助语义推理任务，验证了信念状态估计的有效性与实用性。

Conclusion: 该方法为构建具备人类认知理解能力的协作机器人提供了可行路径，推动了人机团队中隐式协同与自适应辅助的发展。

Abstract: We investigate estimating a human's world belief state using a robot's observations in a dynamic, 3D, and partially observable environment. The methods are grounded in mental model theory, which posits that human decision making, contextual reasoning, situation awareness, and behavior planning draw from an internal simulation or world belief state. When in teams, the mental model also includes a team model of each teammate's beliefs and capabilities, enabling fluent teamwork without the need for constant and explicit communication. In this work we replicate a core component of the team model by inferring a teammate's belief state, or level one situation awareness, as a human-robot team navigates a household environment. We evaluate our methods in a realistic simulation, extend to a real-world robot platform, and demonstrate a downstream application of the belief state through an active assistance semantic reasoning task.

</details>


### [673] [Federated Single-Agent Robotics: Multi-Robot Coordination Without Intra-Robot Multi-Agent Fragmentation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11028)
*Xue Qin,Simin Luan,John See,Cong Yang,Zhijun Li*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出联邦单智能体机器人（FSAR）架构，主张多机器人协同不应通过单个机器人内部多智能体分解实现，而应保持每个机器人为一个具有持久运行时、本地策略范围和恢复权限的单一具身智能体，并通过机器人间的联邦机制在车队层面实现协同。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着具身机器人向大规模车队化运行发展，多机器人协同成为核心系统挑战；现有方法倾向于在单个机器人内部进行多智能体分解，但作者认为这并非必要路径。

Method: 提出FSAR运行时架构，基于单智能体机器人运行时，通过受控能力接口暴露、共享能力注册表、跨机器人任务委派、策略感知的权限分配、可信范围交互及分层恢复协议等机制实现车队级协同；形式化定义了权限委派、跨机器人能力请求、本地与车队恢复边界、分层人工监督等关键协同关系。

Result: 在代表性多机器人协同场景中，相比集中式控制和分解密集型基线，FSAR显著提升了治理局部性（d=2.91, p<.001）和恢复隔离性（d=4.88, p<.001），并减少了所有场景中的权限冲突与策略违规。

Conclusion: 从具身智能体迈向具身车队的演进路径，更应依赖于连贯机器人运行时之间的联邦，而非其内部的碎片化。

Abstract: As embodied robots move toward fleet-scale operation, multi-robot coordination is becoming a central systems challenge. Existing approaches often treat this as motivation for increasing internal multi-agent decomposition within each robot. We argue for a different principle: multi-robot coordination does not require intra-robot multi-agent fragmentation. Each robot should remain a single embodied agent with its own persistent runtime, local policy scope, capability state, and recovery authority, while coordination emerges through federation across robots at the fleet level. We present Federated Single-Agent Robotics (FSAR), a runtime architecture for multi-robot coordination built on single-agent robot runtimes. Each robot exposes a governed capability surface rather than an internally fragmented agent society. Fleet coordination is achieved through shared capability registries, cross-robot task delegation, policy-aware authority assignment, trust-scoped interaction, and layered recovery protocols. We formalize key coordination relations including authority delegation, inter-robot capability requests, local-versus-fleet recovery boundaries, and hierarchical human supervision, and describe a fleet runtime architecture supporting shared Embodied Capability Module (ECM) discovery, contract-aware cross-robot coordination, and fleet-level governance. We evaluate FSAR on representative multi-robot coordination scenarios against decomposition-heavy baselines. Results show statistically significant gains in governance locality (d=2.91, p<.001 vs. centralized control) and recovery containment (d=4.88, p<.001 vs. decomposition-heavy), while reducing authority conflicts and policy violations across all scenarios. Our results support the view that the path from embodied agents to embodied fleets is better served by federation across coherent robot runtimes than by fragmentation within them.

</details>


### [674] [Simulator Adaptation for Sim-to-Real Learning of Legged Locomotion via Proprioceptive Distribution Matching](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11090)
*Jeremy Dao,Alan Fern*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于本体感知分布匹配的仿真器自适应方法，无需运动捕捉或时间对齐，仅用少量真实硬件数据即可显著减少仿真到现实迁移中的行为漂移。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 仿真训练的腿式运动策略在真实硬件上常因仿真与现实动力学差异而性能下降，现有方法依赖高精度、需外部传感器和严格初始条件的时间对齐轨迹匹配，缺乏实用性。

Method: 提出基于关节观测与动作分布的本体感知分布匹配度量，作为黑箱目标函数，用于优化仿真器动力学参数，包括参数辨识、动作增量模型和残差执行器模型。

Result: 在Go2四足机器人上，该方法在sim-to-sim消融实验中达到与特权状态匹配基线相当的参数恢复精度和策略性能提升；真实实验中仅用不到5分钟硬件数据即显著降低运动漂移，甚至适用于具挑战性的双足行走任务。

Conclusion: 本体感知分布匹配是一种实用且有效的仿真器自适应路径，可大幅提升腿式运动策略的sim-to-real迁移效果。

Abstract: Simulation trained legged locomotion policies often exhibit performance loss on hardware due to dynamics discrepancies between the simulator and the real world, highlighting the need for approaches that adapt the simulator itself to better match hardware behavior. Prior work typically quantify these discrepancies through precise, time-aligned matching of joint and base trajectories. This process requires motion capture, privileged sensing, and carefully controlled initial conditions. We introduce a practical alternative based on proprioceptive distribution matching, which compares hardware and simulation rollouts as distributions of joint observations and actions, eliminating the need for time alignment or external sensing. Using this metric as a black-box objective, we explore adapting simulator dynamics through parameter identification, action-delta models, and residual actuator models. Our approach matches the parameter recovery and policy-performance gains of privileged state-matching baselines across extensive sim-to-sim ablations on the Go2 quadruped. Real-world experiments demonstrate substantial drift reduction using less than five minutes of hardware data, even for a challenging two-legged walking behavior. These results demonstrate that proprioceptive distribution matching provides a practical and effective route to simulator adaptation for sim-to-real transfer of learned legged locomotion.

</details>


### [675] [AIM: Intent-Aware Unified world action Modeling with Spatial Value Maps](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11135)
*Liaoyuan Fan,Zetian Xu,Chen Cao,Wenyao Zhang,Mingqi Yuan,Jiayu Chen*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种意图感知的统一世界动作模型AIM，通过显式的空间接口弥合预训练视频生成模型与机器人控制之间的结构鸿沟，显著提升了长时程和接触敏感操作任务的成功率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有统一世界动作模型难以在不进行大量机器人特化训练的情况下可靠解码动作，主要源于视频模型（描述场景演化）与动作生成（需明确交互位置与操作意图）之间的结构性不匹配。

Method: AIM基于预训练视频生成模型，采用共享的混合Transformer架构联合建模未来观测与空间价值图；引入意图因果注意力机制，确保未来信息仅通过价值表征流向动作分支；并设计自蒸馏强化学习阶段，冻结视频和价值分支，仅优化动作头。

Result: 在RoboTwin 2.0基准测试中，AIM达到94.0%平均成功率，显著优于先前统一世界动作基线，尤其在长时程和接触敏感操作任务中提升更明显。

Conclusion: 显式建模空间-意图结构是连接视觉世界建模与机器人控制的有效桥梁，AIM验证了该思路的有效性与泛化能力。

Abstract: Pretrained video generation models provide strong priors for robot control, but existing unified world action models still struggle to decode reliable actions without substantial robot-specific training. We attribute this limitation to a structural mismatch: while video models capture how scenes evolve, action generation requires explicit reasoning about where to interact and the underlying manipulation intent. We introduce AIM, an intent-aware unified world action model that bridges this gap via an explicit spatial interface. Instead of decoding actions directly from future visual representations, AIM predicts an aligned spatial value map that encodes task-relevant interaction structure, enabling a control-oriented abstraction of future dynamics. Built on a pretrained video generation model, AIM jointly models future observations and value maps within a shared mixture-of-transformers architecture. It employs intent-causal attention to route future information to the action branch exclusively through the value representation. We further propose a self-distillation reinforcement learning stage that freezes the video and value branches and optimizes only the action head using dense rewards derived from projected value-map responses together with sparse task-level signals. To support training and evaluation, we construct a simulation dataset of 30K manipulation trajectories with synchronized multi-view observations, actions, and value-map annotations. Experiments on RoboTwin 2.0 benchmark show that AIM achieves a 94.0% average success rate, significantly outperforming prior unified world action baselines. Notably, the improvement is more pronounced in long-horizon and contact-sensitive manipulation tasks, demonstrating the effectiveness of explicit spatial-intent modeling as a bridge between visual world modeling and robot control.

</details>


### [676] [ViserDex: Visual Sim-to-Real for Robust Dexterous In-hand Reorientation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11138)
*Arjun Bhardwaj,Maximum Wilder-Smith,Mayank Mittal,Vaishakh Patil,Marco Hutter*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出一种基于单目RGB视觉的仿真到真实（sim-to-real）框架，利用3D高斯溅射（3DGS）进行域随机化增强，实现灵巧手在-hand物体重定向任务中的鲁棒姿态估计与控制，所有模型均可在消费级硬件上独立训练。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有单目RGB方案在in-hand物体重定向中面临视觉仿真到真实差距大、依赖多相机或昂贵光线追踪的问题，亟需轻量、高效且鲁棒的端到端视觉感知与控制方法。

Method: 采用3D高斯溅射（3DGS）构建可编辑的几何-外观表征，在高斯参数空间中施加物理一致的预渲染增强以实现域随机化；结合课程学习强化训练与教师-学生知识蒸馏策略训练操作策略；感知与控制模块完全解耦、可分别在消费级GPU上训练。

Result: 在挑战性光照下，基于3DGS数据训练的姿态估计器显著优于传统渲染数据训练的基线；在搭载单RGB相机的多指灵巧手上成功完成5种不同物体的in-hand重定向，验证了系统鲁棒性与泛化性。

Conclusion: 3D高斯溅射不仅有效弥合了单目RGB视觉的sim-to-real鸿沟，更成为实现低成本、高精度、纯视觉驱动灵巧操作的实用新路径。

Abstract: In-hand object reorientation requires precise estimation of the object pose to handle complex task dynamics. While RGB sensing offers rich semantic cues for pose tracking, existing solutions rely on multi-camera setups or costly ray tracing. We present a sim-to-real framework for monocular RGB in-hand reorientation that integrates 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) to bridge the visual sim-to-real gap. Our key insight is performing domain randomization in the Gaussian representation space: by applying physically consistent, pre-rendering augmentations to 3D Gaussians, we generate photorealistic, randomized visual data for object pose estimation. The manipulation policy is trained using curriculum-based reinforcement learning with teacher-student distillation, enabling efficient learning of complex behaviors. Importantly, both perception and control models can be trained independently on consumer-grade hardware, eliminating the need for large compute clusters. Experiments show that the pose estimator trained with 3DGS data outperforms those trained using conventional rendering data in challenging visual environments. We validate the system on a physical multi-fingered hand equipped with an RGB camera, demonstrating robust reorientation of five diverse objects even under challenging lighting conditions. Our results highlight Gaussian splatting as a practical path for RGB-only dexterous manipulation. For videos of the hardware deployments and additional supplementary materials, please refer to the project website: https://rffr.leggedrobotics.com/works/viserdex/

</details>


### [677] [EmbodiedGovBench: A Benchmark for Governance, Recovery, and Upgrade Safety in Embodied Agent Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11174)
*Xue Qin,Simin Luan,John See,Cong Yang,Zhijun Li*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出EmbodiedGovBench，一个面向具身智能系统治理能力评估的新基准，聚焦于可控性、策略约束性、可恢复性、可审计性和演化安全性等七个维度，弥补当前仅关注任务成功率的评估缺陷。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有具身AI评估主要依赖任务成功率等指标，忽视了系统是否具备可治理性（如遵守能力边界、执行策略、安全恢复、保留审计轨迹、响应人工监督等关键属性）。

Method: 构建EmbodiedGovBench基准，涵盖七个治理维度（未授权能力调用、运行漂移鲁棒性、恢复成功率、策略可移植性、版本升级安全性、人工覆盖响应性、审计完整性），支持单机与集群场景，定义场景模板、扰动算子、治理指标及基线协议，并适配模块化具身运行时与契约感知升级流程。

Result: 提出了首个系统性评估具身智能治理能力的基准框架，明确了治理作为一类独立且首要的评估目标，并提供了可实例化、可扩展的测量工具。

Conclusion: 具身智能的治理能力应成为与任务性能并重的一流评估目标；EmbodiedGovBench为该范式转变提供了初始且可操作的测量基础。

Abstract: Recent progress in embodied AI has produced a growing ecosystem of robot policies, foundation models, and modular runtimes. However, current evaluation remains dominated by task success metrics such as completion rate or manipulation accuracy. These metrics leave a critical gap: they do not measure whether embodied systems are governable -- whether they respect capability boundaries, enforce policies, recover safely, maintain audit trails, and respond to human oversight. We present EmbodiedGovBench, a benchmark for governance-oriented evaluation of embodied agent systems. Rather than asking only whether a robot can complete a task, EmbodiedGovBench evaluates whether the system remains controllable, policy-bounded, recoverable, auditable, and evolution-safe under realistic perturbations. The benchmark covers seven governance dimensions: unauthorized capability invocation, runtime drift robustness, recovery success, policy portability, version upgrade safety, human override responsiveness, and audit completeness. We define a benchmark structure spanning single-robot and fleet settings, with scenario templates, perturbation operators, governance metrics, and baseline evaluation protocols. We describe how the benchmark can be instantiated over embodied capability runtimes with modular interfaces and contract-aware upgrade workflows. Our analysis suggests that embodied governance should become a first-class evaluation target. EmbodiedGovBench provides the initial measurement framework for that shift.

</details>


### [678] [CLAW: Composable Language-Annotated Whole-body Motion Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11251)
*Jianuo Cao,Yuxin Chen,Masayoshi Tomizuka*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出CLAW系统，一种基于网页的交互式管道，用于为Unitree G1人形机器人大规模生成带自然语言标注的全身运动数据。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
