Motivation: 现有基于动作捕捉的方法成本高、多样性有限；文本到动作生成模型输出纯运动学结果，缺乏物理可行性。

Method: CLAW将运动规划器的运动模式视为可组合的构建块，参数化为运动、朝向、速度、骨盆高度和持续时间；提供键盘实时模式和时间轴序列编辑器两种浏览器界面；通过MuJoCo中低层全身控制器跟踪运动参考，生成物理可行轨迹；采用确定性模板化标注引擎为每段及完整轨迹生成多风格自然语言描述。

Result: 实现了在MuJoCo仿真中以50Hz记录物理可行的全身运动轨迹，并同步生成多样化、多风格的自然语言标注；系统开源。

Conclusion: CLAW为语言-动作配对数据的大规模生成提供了可扩展、物理真实且易用的解决方案，有助于推动人形机器人学习。

Abstract: Training language-conditioned whole-body controllers for humanoid robots requires large-scale datasets pairing motion trajectories with natural-language descriptions.Existing approaches based on motion capture are costly and limited in diversity, while text-to-motion generative models produce purely kinematic outputs that are not guaranteed to be physically feasible.Therefore, we present CLAW, an interactive web-based pipeline for scalable generation of language-annotated whole-body motion data for the Unitree G1 humanoid robot. CLAW treats the motion modes of a kinematic planner as composable building blocks, each parameterized by movement, heading, speed, pelvis height and duration, and provides two browser-based interfaces -- a real-time keyboard mode and a timeline-based sequence editor -- for exploratory and batch data collection. A low-level whole-body controller tracks the planner's kinematic references in MuJoCo simulation, producing physically grounded trajectories recorded at 50Hz. Simultaneously, a deterministic template-based annotation engine generates diverse natural-language descriptions at multiple stylistic registers for every segment and for the full trajectory. We release the system as open source to support scalable generation of language-motion paired data for humanoid robot learning.

</details>


### [679] [Modeling, Analysis and Activation of Planar Viscoelastically-combined Rimless Wheels](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11295)
*Fumihiko Asano,Yuxuan Xiang,Yanqiu Zheng,Cong Yan*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种新型被动动态步行器——粘弹性组合无轮缘轮（VCRW），由两个十字形框架和八个粘弹性元件构成，分为两种类型（VCRW1和VCRW2），并对其运动建模、步态分析及作为步行辅助装置的潜力进行了研究。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 设计一种结构简单、能耗低、具有生物启发性的被动动态步行器，探索其作为新型步行辅助设备的应用潜力。

Method: 构建两种VCRW模型（VCRW1和VCRW2），建立其运动学与动力学模型（含碰撞方程），通过数值仿真分析其被动步行步态特性，并对VCRW2引入激活机制以实现稳定水平步行。

Result: 成功建模并仿真了两类VCRW的被动步行行为；发现VCRW2在适当激活下可实现稳定水平步态；验证了该结构在步行辅助设备中的可行性与创新性。

Conclusion: VCRW是一种新颖、可行的被动动态步行结构，尤其VCRW2具备通过外部激活实现稳定步行的能力，为低功耗步行辅助装置的设计提供了新思路。

Abstract: This paper proposes novel passive-dynamic walkers formed by two cross-shaped frames and eight viscoelastic elements. Since it is a combination of two four-legged rimless wheels via viscoelastic elements, we call it viscoelastically-combined rimless wheel (VCRW). Two types of VCRWs consisting of different cross-shaped frames are introduced; one is formed by combining two Greek-cross-shaped frames (VCRW1), and the other is formed by combining two-link cross-shaped frames that can rotate freely around the central axis (VCRW2). First, we describe the model assumptions and equations of motion and collision. Second, we numerically analyze the basic gait properties of passive dynamic walking. Furthermore, we consider an activation of VCRW2 for generating a stable level gait, and discuss the significance of the study as a novel walking support device.

</details>


### [680] [3D-Anchored Lookahead Planning for Persistent Robotic Scene Memory via World-Model-Based MCTS](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11302)
*Bronislav Sidik,Dror Mizrahi*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出3D-Anchored Lookahead Planning (3D-ALP)，一种结合蒙特卡洛树搜索（MCTS）与3D一致性世界模型的系统2推理引擎，用于机器人操作任务；其核心创新在于通过持久化的相机到世界坐标系（c2w）锚点实现遮挡下的空间记忆与重规划，在需空间记忆的5步序列抓取任务中显著优于贪心反应式基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有反应式策略仅基于当前图像帧决策，无法处理目标被遮挡等需空间记忆的场景；亟需一种具备长期规划与状态维持能力的系统2推理方法。

Method: 将MCTS与3D一致性世界模型结合，构建以c2w锚点为支撑的回滚（rollout）机制；针对连续操作中的UCT-MCTS应用，识别并修复了四类结构性失败模式。

Result: 在E3实验（5步序列到达任务）中，3D-ALP在需记忆的关键步骤（如第5步）成功率分别达0.650和0.822，远超贪心基线（0.006和0.000）；消融表明树搜索的空间记忆贡献82%性能增益（+0.533），更深的前向搜索贡献17%（+0.111）。

Conclusion: 3D-ALP验证了引入系统2式规划与3D锚定世界模型对提升机器人空间推理与鲁棒性的重要价值，为复杂操作任务提供了可解释、可重规划的新范式。

Abstract: We present 3D-Anchored Lookahead Planning (3D-ALP), a System 2 reasoning engine for robotic manipulation that combines Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) with a 3D-consistent world model as the rollout oracle. Unlike reactive policies that evaluate actions from the current camera frame only, 3D-ALP maintains a persistent camera-to-world (c2w) anchor that survives occlusion, enabling accurate replanning to object positions that are no longer directly observable. On a 5-step sequential reach task requiring spatial memory (Experiment E3), 3D-ALP achieves 0.650 0.109 success rate on memory-required steps versus 0.006 0.008 for a greedy reactive baseline (Δ=+0.645), while step 5 success reaches 0.822 against 0.000 for greedy. An ablation study (30 episodes, 3 seeds) isolates tree search spatial memory as the primary driver (+0.533, 82% of gain) with additional benefit from deeper lookahead (+0.111, 17%). We also identify and resolve four structural failure modes in applying UCT-MCTS (Upper Confidence Bounds applied to Trees [10]) to continuous robotic manipulation.

</details>


### [681] [Learning to Forget -- Hierarchical Episodic Memory for Lifelong Robot Deployment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11306)
*Leonard Bärmann,Joana Plewnia,Alex Waibel,Tamim Asfour*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出H²-EMV框架，通过用户交互学习选择性遗忘机制，构建分层的长时情景记忆（EM），在保持问答准确率的同时显著减少内存占用和查询计算开销，并随用户反馈持续提升个性化记忆性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器人需长期存储多模态感知经验以支持自然语言问答，但连续积累会导致存储爆炸与实时查询困难，亟需符合用户相关性认知的选择性遗忘机制。

Method: 提出H²-EMV框架：1）增量构建分层情景记忆；2）基于大语言模型、结合学习到的自然语言规则进行相关性估计以实现选择性遗忘；3）根据用户对遗忘内容的反馈动态更新规则。

Result: 在仿真家庭任务和ARMAR-7机器人20.5小时真实数据上验证：内存减少45%，查询计算降低35%，问答准确率维持；第二轮查询准确率提升70%，体现个性化适应能力。

Conclusion: 学习型选择性遗忘可实现可扩展、个性化的长时情景记忆，支撑长期人机协作。

Abstract: Robots must verbalize their past experiences when users ask "Where did you put my keys?" or "Why did the task fail?" Yet maintaining life-long episodic memory (EM) from continuous multimodal perception quickly exceeds storage limits and makes real-time query impractical, calling for selective forgetting that adapts to users' notions of relevance. We present H$^2$-EMV, a framework enabling humanoids to learn what to remember through user interaction. Our approach incrementally constructs hierarchical EM, selectively forgets using language-model-based relevance estimation conditioned on learned natural-language rules, and updates these rules given user feedback about forgotten details. Evaluations on simulated household tasks and 20.5-hour-long real-world recordings from ARMAR-7 demonstrate that H$^2$-EMV maintains question-answering accuracy while reducing memory size by 45% and query-time compute by 35%. Critically, performance improves over time - accuracy increases 70% in second-round queries by adapting to user-specific priorities - demonstrating that learned forgetting enables scalable, personalized EM for long-term human-robot collaboration.

</details>


### [682] [CLASP: Closed-loop Asynchronous Spatial Perception for Open-vocabulary Desktop Object Grasping](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11320)
*Yiran Ling,Wenxuan Li,Siying Dong,Yize Zhang,Xiaoyao Huang,Jing Jiang,Ruonan Li,Jie Liu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为CLASP的异步闭环空间感知框架，用于提升机器人桌面物体抓取性能，通过双路径感知、异步闭环评估和多模态数据引擎解决VLM在低层抓取中的空间幻觉、开环脆弱性和数据稀缺问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 视觉-语言模型（VLMs）在机器人抓取中面临高质量多模态示范稀缺、空间幻觉（几何接地弱）及动态环境中开环执行脆弱等关键挑战。

Method: 提出CLASP框架：1）双路径分层感知模块解耦高层语义意图与几何接地；2）异步闭环评估器对比执行前后状态并生成文本诊断反馈；3）可扩展多模态数据引擎自动合成空间标注与推理模板。

Result: 实验表明该方法整体成功率高达87.0%，在多样物体、复杂几何场景及杂乱环境中展现出优异泛化性与鲁棒性，并有效弥合仿真到现实差距。

Conclusion: CLASP通过融合多模态感知、逻辑推理与状态反馈，显著提升了VLM驱动机器人抓取的可靠性与适应性，为实际部署提供了可行路径。

Abstract: Robot grasping of desktop object is widely used in intelligent manufacturing, logistics, and agriculture.Although vision-language models (VLMs) show strong potential for robotic manipulation, their deployment in low-level grasping faces key challenges: scarce high-quality multimodal demonstrations, spatial hallucination caused by weak geometric grounding, and the fragility of open-loop execution in dynamic environments. To address these challenges, we propose Closed-Loop Asynchronous Spatial Perception(CLASP), a novel asynchronous closed-loop framework that integrates multimodal perception, logical reasoning, and state-reflective feedback. First, we design a Dual-Pathway Hierarchical Perception module that decouples high-level semantic intent from geometric grounding. The design guides the output of the inference model and the definite action tuples, reducing spatial illusions. Second, an Asynchronous Closed-Loop Evaluator is implemented to compare pre- and post-execution states, providing text-based diagnostic feedback to establish a robust error-correction loop and improving the vulnerability of traditional open-loop execution in dynamic environments. Finally, we design a scalable multi-modal data engine that automatically synthesizes high-quality spatial annotations and reasoning templates from real and synthetic scenes without human teleoperation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach significantly outperforms existing baselines, achieving an 87.0% overall success rate. Notably, the proposed framework exhibits remarkable generalization across diverse objects, bridging the sim-to-real gap and providing exceptional robustness in geometrically challenging categories and cluttered scenarios.

</details>


### [683] [Learning Racket-Ball Bounce Dynamics Across Diverse Rubbers for Robotic Table Tennis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11349)
*Thomas Gossard*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于高斯过程的统一冲击模型，用于准确建模10种不同胶皮类型球拍（包括反胶、防弧、正胶）与乒乓球的碰撞动力学，显著提升了反弹速度与旋转预测精度，尤其对非标准胶皮效果更佳，并支持在线少量数据下的球拍动力学识别。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有球拍-球碰撞模型多为简单线性模型且仅适用于反胶，泛化能力差，难以应对实际中多样的球拍配置。

Method: 构建高帧率多相机系统并估计球体自旋，采集多种入射速度和旋转下的碰撞数据；采用高斯过程回归，以入射速度和自旋为条件，估计具有物理意义的冲量接触模型参数（如恢复系数、切向冲量响应）。

Result: 所提GP模型在所有球拍类型上均降低了反弹速度与旋转的预测误差，对非标准胶皮提升最大；同时支持仅需少量观测即可在线识别球拍动力学。

Conclusion: 该统一框架兼顾物理可解释性与数据驱动适应性，为机器人乒乓球中的可靠控制提供了更普适、精准且具备不确定性估计的动力学模型。

Abstract: Accurate dynamic models for racket-ball bounces are essential for reliable control in robotic table tennis. Existing models typically assume simple linear models and are restricted to inverted rubbers, limiting their ability to generalize across the wide variety of rackets encountered in practice. In this work, we present a unified framework for modeling ball-racket interactions across 10 racket configurations featuring different rubber types, including inverted, anti-spin, and pimpled surfaces. Using a high-speed multi-camera setup with spin estimation, we collect a dataset of racket-ball bounces spanning a broad range of incident velocities and spins. We show that key physical parameters governing rebound, such as the Coefficient of Restitution and tangential impulse response, vary systematically with the impact state and differ significantly across rubbers. To capture these effects while preserving physical interpretability, we estimate the parameters of an impulse-based contact model using Gaussian Processes conditioned on the ball's incoming velocity and spin. The resulting model provides both accurate predictions and uncertainty estimations. Compared to the constant parameter baselines, our approach reduces post-impact velocity and spin prediction errors across all racket types, with the largest improvements observed for nonstandard rubbers. Furthermore, the GP-based model enables online identification of racket dynamics with few observations during gameplay.

</details>


### [684] [WM-DAgger: Enabling Efficient Data Aggregation for Imitation Learning with World Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11351)
*Anlan Yu,Zaishu Chen,Peili Song,Zhiqing Hong,Haotian Wang,Desheng Zhang,Tian He,Yi Ding,Daqing Zhang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出WM-DAgger，一种利用世界模型（World Models）自动生成OOD恢复数据的高效数据聚合框架，无需持续人工干预，在仅需少量示范下显著提升机器人操作任务的成功率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 模仿学习受限于误差累积问题，策略的小错误可能导致机器人进入训练分布外（OOD）状态，进而引发更大错误；而传统DAgger依赖持续人工参与，难以扩展。

Method: 提出WM-DAgger框架，包含两个核心模块：(1) 校正动作合成模块，生成面向任务的恢复动作以避免误导性监督；(2) 一致性引导过滤模块，通过将合成轨迹终点锚定至专家演示的真实帧来剔除物理不可行轨迹。基于眼在手机械臂的少样本操作任务进行设计。

Result: 在多个真实机器人任务上验证，软袋推动任务仅用5次示范即达93.3%成功率。

Conclusion: WM-DAgger有效缓解了模仿学习中的误差累积问题，在无需人工介入前提下，利用世界模型生成高质量OOD恢复数据，显著提升少样本场景下的策略泛化性与鲁棒性。

Abstract: Imitation learning is a powerful paradigm for training robotic policies, yet its performance is limited by compounding errors: minor policy inaccuracies could drive robots into unseen out-of-distribution (OOD) states in the training set, where the policy could generate even bigger errors, leading to eventual failures. While the Data Aggregation (DAgger) framework tries to address this issue, its reliance on continuous human involvement severely limits scalability. In this paper, we propose WM-DAgger, an efficient data aggregation framework that leverages World Models to synthesize OOD recovery data without requiring human involvement. Specifically, we focus on manipulation tasks with an eye-in-hand robotic arm and only few-shot demonstrations. To avoid synthesizing misleading data and overcome the hallucination issues inherent to World Models, our framework introduces two key mechanisms: (1) a Corrective Action Synthesis Module that generates task-oriented recovery actions to prevent misleading supervision, and (2) a Consistency-Guided Filtering Module that discards physically implausible trajectories by anchoring terminal synthesized frames to corresponding real frames in expert demonstrations. We extensively validate WM-DAgger on multiple real-world robotic tasks. Results that our method significantly improves success rates, achieving a 93.3\% success rate in soft bag pushing with only five demonstrations. The source code is publicly available at https://github.com/czs12354-xxdbd/WM-Dagger.

</details>


### [685] [MR.ScaleMaster: Scale-Consistent Collaborative Mapping from Crowd-Sourced Monocular Videos](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11372)
*Hyoseok Ju,Giseop Kim*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出MR.ScaleMaster系统，解决众包单目相机协同建图中的尺度坍塌和尺度漂移问题，通过尺度崩溃警报、Sim(3)锚点节点和模块化接口实现高精度、多模型兼容的三维重建。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 众包单目相机协同建图面临两类尺度相关失效：重复环境中的误闭环导致的突发性尺度坍塌，以及长轨迹下的渐进式尺度漂移和单机器人尺度模糊，阻碍多会话融合。

Method: 提出MR.ScaleMaster系统，包含三部分：1）尺度坍塌警报机制，提前剔除错误闭环；2）基于Sim(3)的锚点节点建模，显式估计并统一各会话尺度；3）模块化、开源、即插即用接口，支持任意单目重建模型无缝集成。

Result: 在KITTI多智能体数据集（最多15个智能体）上，Sim(3)建模使绝对轨迹误差（ATE）相比SE(3)基线降低7.2倍；尺度警报机制成功拒绝全部误闭环且保留所有有效约束；成功融合MASt3R-SLAM、pi3和VGGT-SLAM 2.0实现异构多机器人稠密建图。

Conclusion: MR.ScaleMaster有效解决了众包单目协同建图中的核心尺度问题，提升了建图鲁棒性与可扩展性，并支持异构SLAM系统的统一融合。

Abstract: Crowd-sourced cooperative mapping from monocular cameras promises scalable 3D reconstruction without specialized sensors, yet remains hindered by two scale-specific failure modes: abrupt scale collapse from false-positive loop closures in repetitive environments, and gradual scale drift over long trajectories and per-robot scale ambiguity that prevent direct multi-session fusion. We present MR.ScaleMaster, a cooperative mapping system for crowd-sourced monocular videos that addresses both failure modes. MR.ScaleMaster introduces three key mechanisms. First, a Scale Collapse Alarm rejects spurious loop closures before they corrupt the pose graph. Second, a Sim(3) anchor node formulation generalizes the classical SE(3) framework to explicitly estimate per-session scale, resolving per-robot scale ambiguity and enforcing global scale consistency. Third, a modular, open-source, plug-and-play interface enables any monocular reconstruction model to integrate without backend modification. On KITTI sequences with up to 15 agents, the Sim(3) formulation achieves a 7.2x ATE reduction over the SE(3) baseline, and the alarm rejects all false-positive loops while preserving every valid constraint. We further demonstrate heterogeneous multi-robot dense mapping fusing MASt3R-SLAM, pi3, and VGGT-SLAM 2.0 within a single unified map.

</details>


### [686] [Minimal Embodiment Enables Efficient Learning of Number Concepts in Robot](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11373)
*Zhegong Shangguan,Alessandro Di Nuovo,Angelo Cangelosi*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于具身交互的神经网络模型，通过机器人操作学习计数，展现出高准确率、数据高效性及与人类认知一致的神经表征。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决智能系统如何从感觉运动经验中获取抽象数字概念这一认知科学和人工智能中的基础挑战。

Method: 使用神经网络模型，在Franka Panda机械臂的自然具身交互中进行顺序计数训练，并与纯视觉基线模型对比；分析其神经表征特性（如数量选择性单元、心理数轴、韦伯定律缩放、旋转动态编码等）。

Result: 具身模型在仅10%训练数据下达到96.8%计数准确率（基线为60.6%）；即使视觉-运动对应关系随机化，优势仍存在；自发形成符合生物学规律的数值表征；学习轨迹类比儿童数概念发展。

Conclusion: 最小程度的具身即可为抽象概念提供根基、提升数据效率，并生成可解释、符合生物认知的表征，对具身数学教学与安全关键工业应用具有潜力。

Abstract: Robots are increasingly entering human-interactive scenarios that require understanding of quantity. How intelligent systems acquire abstract numerical concepts from sensorimotor experience remains a fundamental challenge in cognitive science and artificial intelligence. Here we investigate embodied numerical learning using a neural network model trained to perform sequential counting through naturalistic robotic interaction with a Franka Panda manipulator. We demonstrate that embodied models achieve 96.8\% counting accuracy with only 10\% of training data, compared to 60.6\% for vision-only baselines. This advantage persists when visual-motor correspondences are randomized, indicating that embodiment functions as a structural prior that regularizes learning rather than as an information source. The model spontaneously develops biologically plausible representations: number-selective units with logarithmic tuning, mental number line organization, Weber-law scaling, and rotational dynamics encoding numerical magnitude ($r = 0.97$, slope $= 30.6°$/count). The learning trajectory parallels children's developmental progression from subset-knowers to cardinal-principle knowers. These findings demonstrate that minimal embodiment can ground abstract concepts, improve data efficiency, and yield interpretable representations aligned with biological cognition, which may contribute to embodied mathematics tutoring and safety-critical industrial applications.

</details>


### [687] [ComSim: Building Scalable Real-World Robot Data Generation via Compositional Simulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11386)
*Yiran Qin,Jiahua Ma,Li Kang,Wenzhan Li,Yihang Jiao,Xin Wen,Xiufeng Song,Heng Zhou,Jiwen Yu,Zhenfei Yin,Xihui Liu,Philip Torr,Yilun Du,Ruimao Zhang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为'组合式仿真（Compositional Simulation）'的混合仿真方法，结合经典仿真与神经仿真，通过闭环的'真实-仿真-真实'数据增强流程，利用少量真实数据生成大规模、多样化的训练数据，显著缩小仿真到真实世界的域差距，提升机器人策略模型在真实环境中的成功率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 获取大规模、高质量的机器人训练数据困难，依赖大量人工且难以覆盖多样化的现实环境。

Method: 提出'组合式仿真'方法，融合经典仿真与神经仿真，构建闭环的'真实-仿真-真实'数据增强流程；用少量真实数据训练神经仿真器，将经典仿真视频转换为更贴近真实世界的表征。

Result: 实验表明该方法显著减小了sim2real域差距，在真实环境中策略模型的成功率明显提高。

Conclusion: 该方法为机器人提供了一种可扩展的真实感强、多样性高的训练数据生成方案，有效弥合仿真与现实之间的鸿沟。

Abstract: Recent advancements in foundational models, such as large language models and world models, have greatly enhanced the capabilities of robotics, enabling robots to autonomously perform complex tasks. However, acquiring large-scale, high-quality training data for robotics remains a challenge, as it often requires substantial manual effort and is limited in its coverage of diverse real-world environments. To address this, we propose a novel hybrid approach called Compositional Simulation, which combines classical simulation and neural simulation to generate accurate action-video pairs while maintaining real-world consistency. Our approach utilizes a closed-loop real-sim-real data augmentation pipeline, leveraging a small amount of real-world data to generate diverse, large-scale training datasets that cover a broader spectrum of real-world scenarios. We train a neural simulator to transform classical simulation videos into real-world representations, improving the accuracy of policy models trained in real-world environments. Through extensive experiments, we demonstrate that our method significantly reduces the sim2real domain gap, resulting in higher success rates in real-world policy model training. Our approach offers a scalable solution for generating robust training data and bridging the gap between simulated and real-world robotics.

</details>


### [688] [EagleVision: A Multi-Task Benchmark for Cross-Domain Perception in High-Speed Autonomous Racing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11400)
*Zakhar Yagudin,Murad Mebrahtu,Ren Jin,Jiaqi Huang,Yujia Yue,Dzmitry Tsetserukou,Jorge Dias,Majid Khonji*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了EagleVision，一个面向高速自动驾驶赛车的LiDAR多任务基准（3D检测与轨迹预测），整合真实赛道数据（Indy、A2RL）与仿真数据，并系统评估跨域泛化能力，发现城市预训练和真实赛道中间预训练对检测有益，而Indy数据训练对A2RL轨迹预测更具迁移性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基准未能充分反映高速自动驾驶赛车中大相对速度和显著域偏移等极端感知挑战。

Method: 构建统一的LiDAR多任务基准EagleVision，包含新标注的真实赛道（Indy、A2RL）与仿真数据；采用以数据为中心的迁移框架，定量评估城市、仿真与真实赛车域间的跨域泛化性能。

Result: 城市预训练提升检测性能（NDS 0.72 vs. 0.69）；真实赛道中间预训练在A2RL上达到最佳检测迁移效果（NDS 0.726）；Indy训练模型在A2RL轨迹预测上优于其本域训练（FDE 0.947 vs. 1.250）。

Conclusion: EagleVision为研究极端高速动态下的感知泛化提供了系统化工具，验证了数据分布覆盖（尤其是运动分布）对跨域感知性能的关键影响。

Abstract: High-speed autonomous racing presents extreme perception challenges, including large relative velocities and substantial domain shifts from conventional urban-driving datasets. Existing benchmarks do not adequately capture these high-dynamic conditions. We introduce EagleVision, a unified LiDAR-based multi-task benchmark for 3D detection and trajectory prediction in high-speed racing, providing newly annotated 3D bounding boxes for the Indy Autonomous Challenge dataset (14,893 frames) and the A2RL Real competition dataset (1,163 frames), together with 12,000 simulator-generated annotated frames, all standardized under a common evaluation protocol. Using a dataset-centric transfer framework, we quantify cross-domain generalization across urban, simulator, and real racing domains. Urban pretraining improves detection over scratch training (NDS 0.72 vs. 0.69), while intermediate pretraining on real racing data achieves the best transfer to A2RL (NDS 0.726), outperforming simulator-only adaptation. For trajectory prediction, Indy-trained models surpass in-domain A2RL training on A2RL test sequences (FDE 0.947 vs. 1.250), highlighting the role of motion-distribution coverage in cross-domain forecasting. EagleVision enables systematic study of perception generalization under extreme high-speed dynamics. The dataset and benchmark are publicly available at https://avlab.io/EagleVision

</details>


### [689] [Using Unwrapped Full Color Space Palette Recording to Measure Exposedness of a Vehicle Exterior Parts for External Human Machine Interfaces](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11406)
*Jaerock Kwon,Jose Gonzalez-Belmonte*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文研究了自动驾驶汽车外部人机接口（eHMIs）的最佳布置位置，通过Unity仿真和网格贴图展开技术分析2015款福特F-150在四向路口对行人可见性，发现传统前部区域（保险杠、格栅、引擎盖）易被遮挡，建议采用挡风玻璃与前翼子板联合分布的eHMI布局方案。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自动驾驶车辆需有效向行人传达行驶意图以避免事故，而现有eHMIs布置位置的可视性可能受限于交通环境中的遮挡问题。

Method: 采用网格面片展开为唯一颜色纹理的技术，并在Unity引擎中构建动态仿真场景，统计2015款福特F-150车身各点在四向路口对过街行人视线未被遮挡的频次；结合车身部件彩色标注图进行交叉分析。

Result: 保险杠、格栅和引擎盖是行人最常可见的区域，但同车道其他车辆易造成遮挡，导致其作为eHMI安装位置不可靠；挡风玻璃和前翼子板组合具备更高且更稳定的可视性。

Conclusion: eHMIs应采用分布式设计，优先同时布置于挡风玻璃和前翼子板，以提升对行人的意图传达可靠性。

Abstract: One of the concerns with autonomous vehicles is their ability to communicate their intent to other road users, specially pedestrians, in order to prevent accidents. External Human-Machine Interfaces (eHMIs) are the proposed solution to this issue, through the introduction of electronic devices on the exterior of a vehicle that communicate when the vehicle is planning on slowing down or yielding. This paper uses the technique of unwrapping the faces of a mesh onto a texture where every pixel is a unique color, as well as a series of animated simulations made and ran in the Unity game engine, to measure how many times is each point on a 2015 Ford F-150 King Ranch is unobstructed to a pedestrian attempting to cross the road at a four-way intersection. By cross-referencing the results with a color-coded map of the labeled parts on the exterior of the vehicle, it was concluded that while the bumper, grill, and hood were the parts of the vehicle visible to the crossing pedestrian most often, the existence of other vehicles on the same lane that might obstruct the view of these makes them insufficient. The study recommends instead a distributive approach to eHMIs by using both the windshield and frontal fenders as simultaneous placements for these devices.

</details>


### [690] [Efficient Emotion-Aware Iconic Gesture Prediction for Robot Co-Speech](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11417)
*Edwin C. Montiel-Vazquez,Christian Arzate Cruz,Stefanos Gkikas,Thomas Kassiotis,Giorgos Giannakakis,Randy Gomez*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种轻量级Transformer模型，仅基于文本和情感信息生成具有语义强调的共语手势（如标志性动作），无需音频输入，且在BEAT2数据集上性能优于GPT-4o，适合机器人实时部署。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有数据驱动的机器人手势生成系统多局限于节奏性拍打动作，缺乏语义强调能力，而共语手势对提升交互参与度和语音理解至关重要。

Method: 提出一种轻量级Transformer模型，以文本和情感为唯一输入，在推理阶段不依赖音频，预测标志性手势的位置与强度。

Result: 在BEAT2数据集上，该模型在语义手势位置分类和强度回归任务中均超越GPT-4o，同时保持低计算开销。

Conclusion: 仅用文本与情感即可高效生成语义丰富的共语手势，为资源受限的具身智能体提供了实用、实时的手势生成方案。

Abstract: Co-speech gestures increase engagement and improve speech understanding. Most data-driven robot systems generate rhythmic beat-like motion, yet few integrate semantic emphasis. To address this, we propose a lightweight transformer that derives iconic gesture placement and intensity from text and emotion alone, requiring no audio input at inference time. The model outperforms GPT-4o in both semantic gesture placement classification and intensity regression on the BEAT2 dataset, while remaining computationally compact and suitable for real-time deployment on embodied agents.

</details>


### [691] [Dyadic Partnership(DP): A Missing Link Towards Full Autonomy in Medical Robotics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11423)
*Nassir Navab,Zhongliang Jiang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为'二元伙伴关系（Dyadic Partnership, DP）'的新范式，旨在推动医疗机器人从远程操作迈向高阶自主，强调医生与机器人之间智能、专家级的动态协作，融合生成式AI（如世界模型）、多模态可视化与可解释交互等关键技术，并探讨了数据稀缺、标准化不足和伦理接受度等关键挑战。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有医疗机器人多局限于远程操作，缺乏高级认知与决策能力，需探索向部分及完全自主演进的可行路径。

Method: 提出'二元伙伴关系'范式，整合临床基础模型、多模态意图识别、协同学习框架、先进可视化与可解释且信任感知的交互机制。

Result: 明确了实现DP所需的核心技术组件，并论证其作为通往全自主医疗机器人的安全、渐进且临床可接受的关键中间里程碑。

Conclusion: 二元伙伴关系是一种兼具可行性、可接受性与前瞻性的新范式，为跨多种临床场景实现更安全、更直观的人机协作及最终全自主提供了切实可行的路径。

Abstract: For the past decades medical robotic solutions were mostly based on the concept of tele-manipulation. While their design was extremely intelligent, allowing for better access, improved dexterity, reduced tremor, and improved imaging, their intelligence was limited. They therefore left cognition and decision making to the surgeon. As medical robotics advances towards high-level autonomy, the scientific community needs to explore the required pathway towards partial and full autonomy. Here, we introduce the concept of Dyadic Partnership(DP), a new paradigm in which robots and clinicians engage in intelligent, expert interaction and collaboration. The Dyadic Partners would discuss and agree on decisions and actions during their dynamic and interactive collaboration relying also on intuitive advanced media using generative AI, such as a world model, and advanced multi-modal visualization. This article outlines the foundational components needed to enable such systems, including foundation models for clinical intelligence, multi-modal intent recognition, co-learning frameworks, advanced visualization, and explainable, trust-aware interaction. We further discuss key challenges such as data scarcity, lack of standardization, and ethical acceptance. Dyadic partnership is introduced and is positioned as a powerful yet achievable, acceptable milestone offering a promising pathway toward safer, more intuitive collaboration and a gradual transition to full autonomy across diverse clinical settings.

</details>


### [692] [Safe Human-to-Humanoid Motion Imitation Using Control Barrier Functions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11447)
*Wenqi Cai,John Abanes,Nikolaos Evangeliou,Anthony Tzes*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于视觉的框架，使仿人机器人能够实时模仿人类运动并避免自碰撞和人机碰撞，通过单目相机获取人体骨骼关键点、运动重定向及基于控制屏障函数（CBF）的二次规划（QP）安全层实现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 确保人-仿人机器人运动模仿过程中的操作安全性至关重要，尤其是避免自碰撞和人机碰撞。

Method: 利用单个摄像头捕捉人体骨骼关键点，将其转换为关节角度进行运动重定向；引入基于控制屏障函数（CBF）的二次规划（QP）安全层，对模仿指令进行实时过滤以保障安全。

Result: 仿真结果验证了该框架在实时、碰撞感知运动模仿任务中的有效性。

Conclusion: 所提出的视觉驱动、CBF保障的安全模仿框架可在保证运动保真度的同时，有效防止自碰撞与人机碰撞，适用于实际人机协同场景。

Abstract: Ensuring operational safety is critical for human-to-humanoid motion imitation. This paper presents a vision-based framework that enables a humanoid robot to imitate human movements while avoiding collisions. Human skeletal keypoints are captured by a single camera and converted into joint angles for motion retargeting. Safety is enforced through a Control Barrier Function (CBF) layer formulated as a Quadratic Program (QP), which filters imitation commands to prevent both self-collisions and human-robot collisions. Simulation results validate the effectiveness of the proposed framework for real-time collision-aware motion imitation.

</details>


### [693] [DA-PTQ: Drift-Aware Post-Training Quantization for Efficient Vision-Language-Action Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11572)
*Siyuan Xu,Tianshi Wang,Fengling Li,Lei Zhu,Heng Tao Shen*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种面向视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型的漂移感知后训练量化方法（DA-PTQ），以缓解资源受限机器人上部署VLAs时因量化导致的时序误差累积与运动轨迹漂移问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: VLAs在具身智能中潜力巨大，但其高内存与计算开销阻碍了在资源受限机器人上的部署；现有后训练量化（PTQ）方法直接应用于VLAs会导致严重的时序性能下降，主因是视觉-语言到动作接口处的量化扰动随时间累积，引发运动学漂移。

Method: 提出Drift-Aware Post-Training Quantization（DA-PTQ）：（1）跨空间表征补偿，缓解多模态表征与动作空间间的结构失真，提升动作一致性；（2）运动驱动的混合精度分配，依据轨迹级运动误差最小化原则动态分配各模块比特宽度。

Result: 实验表明，DA-PTQ显著降低运动学漂移，在低比特设置下性能接近全精度模型，支持VLAs在资源受限机器人平台上的实际部署。

Conclusion: DA-PTQ通过建模量化对序列决策过程的影响，实现了兼顾精度与效率的VLA模型压缩，为边缘端具身智能提供了可行的技术路径。

Abstract: Vision-Language-Action models (VLAs) have demonstrated strong potential for embodied AI, yet their deployment on resource-limited robots remains challenging due to high memory and computational demands. While Post-Training Quantization (PTQ) provides an efficient solution, directly applying PTQ to VLAs often results in severe performance degradation during sequential control. We identify temporal error accumulation as a key factor, where quantization perturbations at the vision-language-to-action interface are progressively amplified, leading to kinematic drift in executed trajectories. To address this issue, we propose Drift-Aware Post-Training Quantization (DA-PTQ), which formulates quantization as a drift-aware optimization problem over sequential decision processes. DA-PTQ consists of two components: (1) Cross-Space Representation Compensation, which mitigates structured distortions between multimodal representations and action space to improve action consistency, and (2) Motion-Driven Mixed-Precision Allocation, which assigns bit-widths by minimizing trajectory-level motion errors. Extensive experiments show that DA-PTQ significantly reduces kinematic drift and achieves comparable performance to full-precision models under low-bit settings, enabling practical deployment of VLAs on resource-limited robotic platforms.

</details>


### [694] [Optimal Kinodynamic Motion Planning Through Anytime Bidirectional Heuristic Search with Tight Termination Condition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11587)
*Yi Wang,Bingxian Mu,Shahab Shokouhi,May-Win Thein*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了BTIT*算法，一种渐进最优的运动规划算法，结合了双向启发式搜索与中间相遇特性，实现了快速首次解和更优收敛性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为了解决现有运动规划算法在时间效率和渐进最优性之间的权衡问题，特别是缺乏高效可评估的终止条件以支持在线早停。

Method: 提出Bidirectional Tight Informed Trees (BTIT*)，融合任意时间双向启发式搜索（Bi-HS），保证meet-in-the-middle性质（MMP）与MM-最优性，并设计高效的批采样终止条件。

Result: 在4D双积分器与10D线性化四旋翼两个动力学基准上，BTIT*显著快于代表性非懒惰启发式批规划器，首次解时间更短、收敛性更好。

Conclusion: BTIT*是首个支持高效在线早停的任意时间MEET风格算法，兼具理论最优性与实际高效性，推动了采样型动力学规划的发展。

Abstract: This paper introduces Bidirectional Tight Informed Trees (BTIT*), an asymptotically optimal kinodynamic sampling-based motion planning algorithm that integrates an anytime bidirectional heuristic search (Bi-HS) and ensures the \emph{meet-in-the-middle} property (MMP) and optimality (MM-optimality). BTIT* is the first anytime MEET-style algorithm to utilize termination conditions that are efficient to evaluate and enable early termination \emph{on-the-fly} in batch-wise sampling-based motion planning. Experiments show that BTIT* achieves strongly faster time-to-first-solution and improved convergence than representative \emph{non-lazy} informed batch planners on two kinodynamic benchmarks: a 4D double-integrator model and a 10D linearized Quadrotor. The source code is available here.

</details>


### [695] [Micro-Dexterity in Biological Micromanipulation: Embodiment, Perception, and Control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11640)
*Kangyi Lu,Lan Wei,Zongcai Tan,Dandan Zhang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文综述了微尺度生物操纵中的“微灵巧性”（micro-dexterity）概念，强调在低雷诺数、界面力主导、目标脆弱等特殊环境下，需重新定义传统操纵范式（如推、抓、协同操作），并整合具身性、感知与控制三方面构建统一分析框架。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有微操作平台虽在运动控制和靶向运输上进展显著，但在需精确、自适应交互的生物医学应用中仍面临根本性挑战：经典宏观操纵假设（刚体接触、稳定抓取、丰富本体感知）在微尺度下失效。

Method: 提出‘微灵巧性’分析框架，系统梳理微尺度下操纵原语（pushing, reorientation, grasping, cooperative manipulation）的重构方式；横向对比三类主流平台（具身微机器人、场介导系统、外驱动末端执行器）的架构特性；并归纳适配的感知与控制策略。

Result: 厘清了微操纵中 embodiment、perception 和 control 的耦合关系；分类总结了不同平台实现各类操纵原语的能力边界；识别出当前实验室演示与临床实用之间存在的‘灵巧性鸿沟’。

Conclusion: 推动微灵巧性从概念走向临床，需突破环境建模、实时闭环感知、鲁棒自适应控制及多物理场协同设计等关键挑战。

Abstract: Microscale manipulation has advanced substantially in controlled locomotion and targeted transport, yet many biomedical applications require precise and adaptive interaction with biological micro-objects. At these scales, manipulation is realized through three main classes of platforms: embodied microrobots that physically interact as mobile agents, field-mediated systems that generate contactless trapping or manipulation forces, and externally actuated end-effectors that interact through remotely driven physical tools. Unlike macroscale manipulators, these systems function in fluidic, confined, and surface-dominated environments characterized by negligible inertia, dominant interfacial forces, and soft, heterogeneous, and fragile targets. Consequently, classical assumptions of dexterous manipulation, including rigid-body contact, stable grasping, and rich proprioceptive feedback, become difficult to maintain. This review introduces micro-dexterity as a framework for analyzing biological micromanipulation through the coupled roles of embodiment, perception, and control. We examine how classical manipulation primitives, including pushing, reorientation, grasping, and cooperative manipulation, are reformulated at the microscale; compare the architectures that enable them, from contact-based micromanipulators to contactless field-mediated systems and cooperative multi-agent platforms; and review the perception and control strategies required for task execution. We identify the current dexterity gap between laboratory demonstrations and clinically relevant biological manipulation, and outline key challenges for future translation.

</details>


### [696] [AffordSim: A Scalable Data Generator and Benchmark for Affordance-Aware Robotic Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11674)
*Mingyang Li,Haofan Xu,Haowen Sun,Xinzhe Chen,Sihua Ren,Liqi Huang,Xinyang Sui,Chenyang Miao,Qiongjie Cui,Zeyang Liu,Xingyu Chen,Xuguang Lan*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了AffordSim，首个将开放词汇3D功能预测集成到机器人操作数据生成流程中的仿真框架，通过VoxAfford模型预测物体点云上的功能区域，指导抓取姿态估计，并在50个任务上验证了其有效性，揭示了当前模仿学习方法在功能敏感任务上的局限性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有仿真平台未将物体功能（affordance）信息纳入轨迹生成，导致难以自动生成语义正确的操作轨迹（如握柄、倾倒、挂杯等）。

Method: 提出AffordSim框架，结合VoxAfford——一种融合多尺度几何特征以增强MLLM输出的开放词汇3D功能检测器；基于NVIDIA Isaac Sim构建，支持多机械臂、VLM驱动任务生成及基于DA3的3D高斯重建域随机化。

Result: 在涵盖7类共50个任务的基准上评估4种模仿学习方法，发现抓取成功率较高（53–93%），但倾倒（1–43%）和挂杯（0–47%）等功能敏感任务成功率显著偏低；零样本sim-to-real实验证明数据可迁移到真实Franka FR3机械臂。

Conclusion: 功能感知的数据生成对提升复杂操作任务性能至关重要，AffordSim为解决当前模仿学习在功能敏感任务上的瓶颈提供了新范式与可扩展工具。

Abstract: Simulation-based data generation has become a dominant paradigm for training robotic manipulation policies, yet existing platforms do not incorporate object affordance information into trajectory generation. As a result, tasks requiring precise interaction with specific functional regions--grasping a mug by its handle, pouring from a cup's rim, or hanging a mug on a hook--cannot be automatically generated with semantically correct trajectories. We introduce AffordSim, the first simulation framework that integrates open-vocabulary 3D affordance prediction into the manipulation data generation pipeline. AffordSim uses our VoxAfford model, an open-vocabulary 3D affordance detector that enhances MLLM output tokens with multi-scale geometric features, to predict affordance maps on object point clouds, guiding grasp pose estimation toward task-relevant functional regions. Built on NVIDIA Isaac Sim with cross-embodiment support (Franka FR3, Panda, UR5e, Kinova), VLM-powered task generation, and novel domain randomization using DA3-based 3D Gaussian reconstruction from real photographs, AffordSim enables automated, scalable generation of affordance-aware manipulation data. We establish a benchmark of 50 tasks across 7 categories (grasping, placing, stacking, pushing/pulling, pouring, mug hanging, long-horizon composite) and evaluate 4 imitation learning baselines (BC, Diffusion Policy, ACT, Pi 0.5). Our results reveal that while grasping is largely solved (53-93% success), affordance-demanding tasks such as pouring into narrow containers (1-43%) and mug hanging (0-47%) remain significantly more challenging for current imitation learning methods, highlighting the need for affordance-aware data generation. Zero-shot sim-to-real experiments on a real Franka FR3 validate the transferability of the generated data.

</details>


### [697] [Dual-Control Frequency-Aware Diffusion Model for Depth-Dependent Optical Microrobot Microscopy Image Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11680)
*Lan Wei,Zongcai Tan,Kangyi Lu,Jian-Qing Zheng,Dandan Zhang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出Du-FreqNet——一种双控、频域感知的扩散模型，用于生成物理一致的显微镜图像，以解决光学微机器人3D感知中高质量标注数据稀缺的问题；该模型通过双ControlNet分支编码点云与深度分层网格，并引入自适应频域损失，在有限数据下实现深度依赖的可控图像合成，显著提升SSIM及下游3D位姿与深度估计性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 光学微机器人自主操作依赖准确的3D感知，但高质量大规模显微镜标注数据稀缺；现有GAN方法难以建模深度相关的衍射与离焦等关键光学特性。

Method: 提出Du-FreqNet：包含两个独立ControlNet分支，分别编码微机器人3D点云和深度特异性网格层；引入基于距离焦平面动态重权高低频分量的自适应频域损失；采用可微FFT监督，捕捉像素空间方法易忽略的物理合理频谱分布。

Result: 在仅80张/姿态的有限数据上训练，Du-FreqNet在SSIM上较基线提升20.7%；泛化至未见姿态效果好；显著提升3D位姿估计与深度估计精度，增强微机器人闭环控制鲁棒性。

Conclusion: Du-FreqNet通过频域建模与物理驱动的监督，有效解决了显微图像生成中深度相关光学效应建模难的问题，为小样本下微机器人3D感知提供了可靠数据增强方案。

Abstract: Optical microrobots actuated by optical tweezers (OT) are important for cell manipulation and microscale assembly, but their autonomous operation depends on accurate 3D perception. Developing such perception systems is challenging because large-scale, high-quality microscopy datasets are scarce, owing to complex fabrication processes and labor-intensive annotation. Although generative AI offers a promising route for data augmentation, existing generative adversarial network (GAN)-based methods struggle to reproduce key optical characteristics, particularly depth-dependent diffraction and defocus effects. To address this limitation, we propose Du-FreqNet, a dual-control, frequency-aware diffusion model for physically consistent microscopy image synthesis. The framework features two independent ControlNet branches to encode microrobot 3D point clouds and depth-specific mesh layers, respectively. We introduce an adaptive frequency-domain loss that dynamically reweights high- and low-frequency components based on the distance to the focal plane. By leveraging differentiable FFT-based supervision, Du-FreqNet captures physically meaningful frequency distributions often missed by pixel-space methods. Trained on a limited dataset (e.g., 80 images per pose), our model achieves controllable, depth-dependent image synthesis, improving SSIM by 20.7% over baselines. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Du-FreqNet generalizes effectively to unseen poses and significantly enhances downstream tasks, including 3D pose and depth estimation, thereby facilitating robust closed-loop control in microrobotic systems.

</details>


### [698] [ACT: Automated CPS Testing for Open-Source Robotic Platforms](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11708)
*Aditya A. Krishnan,Donghoon Kim,Hokeun Kim*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为Automated CPS Testing (ACT)的自动化连续测试框架，用于在真实机器人平台上对开源网络物理系统（CPS）软件进行测试，并与GitHub等开源基础设施集成，以提升多贡献者协作下CPS软件的可靠性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 开源CPS软件常缺乏基于真实机器人平台的鲁棒性测试，导致关键错误难以发现，尤其在多贡献者开发多个模块时问题更突出。

Method: 提出并实现了ACT框架，支持自动化、持续地在机器人平台上测试开源CPS软件，并与GitHub等开源基础设施集成；通过在教育机器人平台上的案例研究验证其有效性。

Result: 成功实现ACT原型，并在实际开源CPS项目中验证了其能有效检测出未被发现的关键错误，提升了测试覆盖率和软件可靠性。

Conclusion: ACT为开源CPS软件提供了可行的自动化测试解决方案，有助于增强多贡献者环境下CPS系统的质量保障能力。

Abstract: Open-source software for cyber-physical systems (CPS) often lacks robust testing involving robotic platforms, resulting in critical errors that remain undetected. This is especially challenging when multiple modules of CPS software are developed by various open-source contributors. To address this gap, we propose Automated CPS Testing (ACT) that performs automated, continuous testing of open-source software with its robotic platforms, integrated with the open-source infrastructure such as GitHub. We implement an ACT prototype and conduct a case study on an open-source CPS with an educational robotic platform to demonstrate its capabilities.

</details>


### [699] [Multi-ORFT: Stable Online Reinforcement Fine-Tuning for Multi-Agent Diffusion Planning in Cooperative Driving](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11734)
*Haojie Bai,Aimin Li,Ruoyu Yao,Xiongwei Zhao,Tingting Zhang,Xing Zhang,Lin Gao,and Jun Ma*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出Multi-ORFT，结合场景条件扩散预训练与稳定的在线强化后训练，提升多智能体协同驾驶的轨迹合理性、安全性与效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有扩散规划器在场景一致性与闭环目标对齐方面表现不足，且难以在反应式多智能体环境中稳定在线微调。

Method: 采用带自注意力、交叉注意力和AdaLN-Zero场景条件的扩散预训练；设计两层MDP以暴露反向核似然用于在线优化，并结合轨迹级稠密奖励与方差门控组相对策略优化（VG-GRPO）稳定后训练。

Result: 在WOMD闭环基准上，相比预训练模型，碰撞率从2.04%降至1.89%，越界率从1.68%降至1.36%，平均速度从8.36 m/s提升至8.61 m/s，并超越SMART-large、SMART-tiny-CLSFT和VBD等基线。

Conclusion: 将场景一致的去噪建模与稳定的在线扩散-策略优化相结合，可显著提升闭环协同驾驶的可靠性。

Abstract: Closed-loop cooperative driving requires planners that generate realistic multimodal multi-agent trajectories while improving safety and traffic efficiency. Existing diffusion planners can model multimodal behaviors from demonstrations, but they often exhibit weak scene consistency and remain poorly aligned with closed-loop objectives; meanwhile, stable online post-training in reactive multi-agent environments remains difficult. We present Multi-ORFT, which couples scene-conditioned diffusion pre-training with stable online reinforcement post-training. In pre-training, the planner uses inter-agent self-attention, cross-attention, and AdaLN-Zero-based scene conditioning to improve scene consistency and road adherence of joint trajectories. In post-training, we formulate a two-level MDP that exposes step-wise reverse-kernel likelihoods for online optimization, and combine dense trajectory-level rewards with variance-gated group-relative policy optimization (VG-GRPO) to stabilize training. On the WOMD closed-loop benchmark, Multi-ORFT reduces collision rate from 2.04% to 1.89% and off-road rate from 1.68% to 1.36%, while increasing average speed from 8.36 to 8.61 m/s relative to the pre-trained planner, and it outperforms strong open-source baselines including SMART-large, SMART-tiny-CLSFT, and VBD on the primary safety and efficiency metrics. These results show that coupling scene-consistent denoising with stable online diffusion-policy optimization improves the reliability of closed-loop cooperative driving.

</details>


### [700] [Grounded World Model for Semantically Generalizable Planning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11751)
*Quanyi Li,Lan Feng,Haonan Zhang,Wuyang Li,Letian Wang,Alexandre Alahi,Harold Soh*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于视觉-语言对齐潜在空间的接地世界模型（GWM），将视觉运动模型预测控制（MPC）转化为视觉-语言动作（VLA）范式，显著提升了在新环境和新指令下的泛化能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统visuomotor MPC依赖预设目标图像，难以在新环境中提前获取，且图像目标缺乏自然语言的交互灵活性；现有视觉-语言动作（VLA）方法语义泛化能力不足。

Method: 构建一个在视觉-语言对齐潜在空间中学习的Grounded World Model（GWM），用任务指令的嵌入与动作预测结果的嵌入相似度作为MPC中的评分函数，替代传统基于目标图像的潜空间距离度量。

Result: 在WISER基准上，GWM-MPC在288个含未见视觉信号和指代表达的任务上达到87%成功率；而传统VLA在测试集仅22%，尽管其训练集过拟合达90%。

Conclusion: 将MPC的目标表征从图像迁移至语言嵌入，并在对齐的多模态潜在空间中建模，可大幅提升零样本语义泛化能力，实现更鲁棒、更具交互性的具身智能控制。

Abstract: In Model Predictive Control (MPC), world models predict the future outcomes of various action proposals, which are then scored to guide the selection of the optimal action. For visuomotor MPC, the score function is a distance metric between a predicted image and a goal image, measured in the latent space of a pretrained vision encoder like DINO and JEPA. However, it is challenging to obtain the goal image in advance of the task execution, particularly in new environments. Additionally, conveying the goal through an image offers limited interactivity compared with natural language. In this work, we propose to learn a Grounded World Model (GWM) in a vision-language-aligned latent space. As a result, each proposed action is scored based on how close its future outcome is to the task instruction, reflected by the similarity of embeddings. This approach transforms the visuomotor MPC to a VLA that surpasses VLM-based VLAs in semantic generalization. On the proposed WISER benchmark, GWM-MPC achieves a 87% success rate on the test set comprising 288 tasks that feature unseen visual signals and referring expressions, yet remain solvable with motions demonstrated during training. In contrast, traditional VLAs achieve an average success rate of 22%, even though they overfit the training set with a 90% success rate.

</details>


### [701] [StarVLA-$α$: Reducing Complexity in Vision-Language-Action Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11757)
*Jinhui Ye,Ning Gao,Senqiao Yang,Jinliang Zheng,Zixuan Wang,Yuxin Chen,Pengguang Chen,Yilun Chen,Shu Liu,Jiaya Jia*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了StarVLA-α，一个简化但强效的视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型基线，旨在在受控条件下系统研究VLA设计选择，发现精简架构配合强大视觉语言模型（VLM）主干已足以实现优异性能，无需复杂工程。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有VLA模型在架构、数据、具身配置和基准工程等方面高度碎片化且复杂，缺乏统一、可控的基准用于系统性分析关键设计选择。

Method: 提出StarVLA-α，采用极简架构与训练流程，统一在LIBERO、SimplerEnv、RoboTwin和RoboCasa多基准上训练，并重新评估动作建模、机器人专用预训练及接口工程等关键设计轴。

Result: StarVLA-α在多个仿真基准上保持高度竞争力，并在真实世界RoboChallenge基准上以单通用模型超越π₀.₅达20%。

Conclusion: 强大的VLM主干结合最小化设计已足够支撑高性能VLA，过度架构复杂性与工程技巧并非必要；StarVLA-α可作为未来VLA研究的坚实起点。

Abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have recently emerged as a promising paradigm for building general-purpose robotic agents. However, the VLA landscape remains highly fragmented and complex: as existing approaches vary substantially in architectures, training data, embodiment configurations, and benchmark-specific engineering. In this work, we introduce StarVLA-$α$, a simple yet strong baseline designed to study VLA design choices under controlled conditions. StarVLA-$α$ deliberately minimizes architectural and pipeline complexity to reduce experimental confounders and enable systematic analysis. Specifically, we re-evaluate several key design axes, including action modeling strategies, robot-specific pretraining, and interface engineering. Across unified multi-benchmark training on LIBERO, SimplerEnv, RoboTwin, and RoboCasa, the same simple baseline remains highly competitive, indicating that a strong VLM backbone combined with minimal design is already sufficient to achieve strong performance without relying on additional architectural complexity or engineering tricks. Notably, our single generalist model outperforms $π_{0.5}$ by 20\% on the public real-world RoboChallenge benchmark. We expect StarVLA-$α$ to serve as a solid starting point for future research in the VLA regime. Code will be released at https://github.com/starVLA/starVLA.

</details>


### [702] [Identifying Inductive Biases for Robot Co-Design](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11768)
*Apoorv Vaish,Oliver Brock*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种针对软体机器人形态与控制协同设计的高效算法，通过分析协同设计空间中的结构规律（如低维流形、高质区域的多维变化与强耦合性），自适应地推断并利用任务特定的归纳偏置，显著提升了优化效率与性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 协同设计机器人形态与控制虽能带来生物启发式的协同效应，但其高维搜索空间使问题难以求解，亟需系统化方法识别适配其结构的归纳偏置。

Method: 分析软体运动与操作任务的协同设计景观，发现三类跨区域一致的结构模式；据此设计一种能在线推断并适配任务特有结构的协同设计算法。

Result: 相较基准算法，性能提升36%，采样效率提高两个数量级以上。

Conclusion: 利用从搜索过程中学习到的归纳偏置可极大提升协同设计的效率与效果，验证了结构感知算法在复杂联合优化问题中的有效性。

Abstract: Co-designing a robot's morphology and control can ensure synergistic interactions between them, prevalent in biological organisms. However, co-design is a high-dimensional search problem. To make this search tractable, we need a systematic method for identifying inductive biases tailored to its structure. In this paper, we analyze co-design landscapes for soft locomotion and manipulation tasks and identify three patterns that are consistent across regions of their co-design spaces. We observe that within regions of co-design space, quality varies along a low-dimensional manifold. Higher-quality regions exhibit variations spread across more dimensions, while tightly coupling morphology and control. We leverage these insights to devise an efficient co-design algorithm. Since the precise instantiation of this structure varies across tasks and is not known a priori, our algorithm infers it from information gathered during search and adapts to each task's specific structure. This yields $36\%$ more improvement than benchmark algorithms. Moreover, our algorithm achieved more than two orders of magnitude in sample efficiency compared to these benchmark algorithms, demonstrating the effectiveness of leveraging inductive biases to co-design.

</details>


### [703] [Disentangled Point Diffusion for Precise Object Placement](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11793)
*Lyuxing He,Eric Cai,Shobhit Aggarwal,Jianjun Wang,David Held*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出TAX-DPD框架，一种分层、解耦的点云扩散模型，用于机器人操作中的目标物体放置任务，在放置精度、多模态覆盖和泛化能力上达到SOTA。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 端到端策略虽灵活但泛化性和精度不足；对象中心方法（预测放置位姿）更具模块化优势，但需提升精度与对几何/场景变化的鲁棒性。

Method: 提出TAX-DPD：1）全局层使用前馈稠密高斯混合模型（Dense GMM）建模场景级密集空间先验；2）局部层采用解耦点云扩散模块，分别扩散物体几何与位姿坐标系，实现精细局部几何推理。

Result: 在仿真与真实工业插入任务中显著提升放置精度、多模态覆盖及对物体几何与场景变化的泛化能力；在布料悬挂仿真任务中验证了对非刚性物体的适用性；点云扩散比SE(3)-diffusion精度更高。

Conclusion: TAX-DPD通过分层解耦建模，有效平衡全局语义理解与局部几何精度，在刚性与非刚性物体操作任务中展现出强泛化性与实用性。

Abstract: Recent advances in robotic manipulation have highlighted the effectiveness of learning from demonstration. However, while end-to-end policies excel in expressivity and flexibility, they struggle both in generalizing to novel object geometries and in attaining a high degree of precision. An alternative, object-centric approach frames the task as predicting the placement pose of the target object, providing a modular decomposition of the problem. Building on this goal-prediction paradigm, we propose TAX-DPD, a hierarchical, disentangled point diffusion framework that achieves state-of-the-art performance in placement precision, multi-modal coverage, and generalization to variations in object geometries and scene configurations. We model global scene-level placements through a novel feed-forward Dense Gaussian Mixture Model (GMM) that yields a spatially dense prior over global placements; we then model the local object-level configuration through a novel disentangled point cloud diffusion module that separately diffuses the object geometry and the placement frame, enabling precise local geometric reasoning. Interestingly, we demonstrate that our point cloud diffusion achieves substantially higher accuracy than a prior approach based on SE(3)-diffusion, even in the context of rigid object placement. We validate our approach across a suite of challenging tasks in simulation and in the real-world on high-precision industrial insertion tasks. Furthermore, we present results on a cloth-hanging task in simulation, indicating that our framework can further relax assumptions on object rigidity.

</details>


<div id='cs.MA'></div>

# cs.MA [[Back]](#toc)

### [704] [Heterogeneous Consensus-Progressive Reasoning for Efficient Multi-Agent Debate](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09679)
*Yiqing Liu,Hantao Yao,Wu Liu,Allen He,Yongdong Zhang*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文提出HCP-MAD框架，通过异构共识与渐进式推理机制，在多智能体辩论中实现任务复杂度自适应，兼顾高准确率与低token消耗。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法分别优化单轮内拓扑与跨轮交互，导致无论任务难易均产生高额token开销；而实际中简单任务只需轻量级双智能体辩论，复杂任务才需扩展协作。

Method: 提出三阶段渐进式推理机制：1）异构共识验证（双异构智能体快速共识检验以实现早期终止）；2）异构双智能体辩论（基于记录推理轨迹的自适应停止准则动态终止互评）；3）升级集体投票（对未解决任务引入更多智能体进行多样性视角聚合）。

Result: 在多个基准测试中，HCP-MAD显著提升准确率，同时大幅降低token消耗。

Conclusion: HCP-MAD通过将共识作为动态信号驱动渐进式推理，实现了多智能体辩论在效率与效果上的协同优化，为不同复杂度任务提供了自适应解决方案。

Abstract: Multi-Agent Debate (MAD) is a collaborative framework in which multiple agents iteratively refine solutions through the generation of reasoning and alternating critique cycles. Current work primarily optimizes intra-round topologies and inter-round interactions separately, which still results in high token costs regardless of task complexity. This work introduces Heterogeneous Consensus-Progressive Reasoning for Efficient Multi-Agent Debate (HCP-MAD), leveraging consensus as a dynamic signal to facilitate progressive reasoning. The core motivation is that a majority of straightforward tasks can be effectively resolved via lightweight pair-agent debates, while complex tasks require expanded collaboration. Consequently, HCP-MAD employs a three-stage progressive reasoning mechanism to develop adaptive solutions across varying task complexities. Firstly, Heterogeneous Consensus Verification conducts rapid consensus verification using a pair of heterogeneous agents for early stopping. Next, the Heterogeneous Pair-Agent Debate applies an adaptive stopping criterion to dynamically terminate mutual critique of recorded reasoning traces. Finally, the unresolved tasks are addressed through Escalated Collective Voting by aggregating diverse perspectives from additional agents. Experiments across multiple benchmarks show that HCP-MAD significantly enhances accuracy while substantially reducing token costs.

</details>


### [705] [MPAC: A Multi-Principal Agent Coordination Protocol for Interoperable Multi-Agent Collaboration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09744)
*Kaiyang Qian,Xinmin Fang,Zhengxiong Li*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文提出MPAC协议，用于解决多主体AI代理在共享状态下的协调问题，通过五层结构（会话、意图、操作、冲突、治理）实现显式协调语义，并在代码审查基准测试中显著降低协调开销并提升执行速度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有AI代理协议（如MCP和A2A）仅支持单主体控制，无法应对多个独立主体（如不同工程师、家庭成员或组织）的代理在共享状态（如代码仓库、旅行计划、联合决策）下协同工作的需求，导致协调退化为低效的手动方式。

Method: 设计并实现MPAC（Multi-Principal Agent Coordination Protocol），一个应用层协议，包含五层协调语义；定义21种消息类型、3个带规范转移表的状态机、Lamport时钟因果水印、两种执行模型、三种安全配置及乐观并发控制；提供Python与TypeScript双语言参考实现、JSON Schema套件及7个实时多智能体演示。

Result: 在三代理代码审查受控基准测试中，相比串行人工中介基线，MPAC将协调开销降低95%，墙钟时间加速4.8倍，且各代理决策时间保持不变；加速源于消除协调等待，而非压缩模型调用。

Conclusion: MPAC填补了多主体AI代理协调的协议空白，支持意图前置声明、结构化冲突表示与可插拔治理机制，具备工程可行性与实证有效性，全部成果开源。

Abstract: The AI agent ecosystem has converged on two protocols: the Model Context Protocol (MCP) for tool invocation and Agent-to-Agent (A2A) for single-principal task delegation. Both assume a single controlling principal, meaning one person or organization that owns every agent. When independent principals' agents must coordinate over shared state, such as engineers' coding agents editing the same repository, family members planning a shared trip, or agents from different organizations negotiating a joint decision, neither protocol applies, and coordination collapses to ad-hoc chat, manual merging, or silent overwrites. We present MPAC (Multi-Principal Agent Coordination Protocol), an application-layer protocol that fills this gap with explicit coordination semantics across five layers: Session, Intent, Operation, Conflict, and Governance. MPAC makes intent declaration a precondition for action, represents conflicts as first-class structured objects, and supports human-in-the-loop arbitration through a pluggable governance layer. The specification defines 21 message types, three state machines with normative transition tables, Lamport-clock causal watermarking, two execution models, three security profiles, and optimistic concurrency control on shared state. We release two interoperable reference implementations in Python and TypeScript with 223 tests, a JSON Schema suite, and seven live multi-agent demos. A controlled three-agent code review benchmark shows a 95 percent reduction in coordination overhead and a 4.8 times wall-clock speedup versus a serialized human-mediated baseline, with per-agent decision time preserved. The speedup comes from eliminating coordination waits, not compressing model calls. Specification, implementations, and demos are open source.

</details>


### [706] [CONSCIENTIA: Can LLM Agents Learn to Strategize? Emergent Deception and Trust in a Multi-Agent NYC Simulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09746)
*Aarush Sinha,Arion Das,Soumyadeep Nag,Charan Karnati,Shravani Nag,Chandra Vadhan Raj,Aman Chadha,Vinija Jain,Suranjana Trivedy,Amitava Das*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文构建了一个多智能体模拟环境，研究大语言模型（LLM）驱动的智能体在对抗性激励下的策略行为演化，发现其虽能发展出有限策略能力（如选择性信任与欺骗），但仍高度易受说服性干扰，且安全性与任务有效性存在权衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着LLM作为自主智能体部署增多，理解其在多智能体环境中如何涌现策略行为成为重要对齐挑战；需在可控环境下直接观测和量化该行为。

Method: 构建基于简化纽约市模型的大规模多智能体仿真环境，设置具有对立目标的Blue（高效导航）与Red（诱导至广告密集路径）智能体；采用Kahneman-Tversky优化（KTO）进行多轮策略迭代更新，并隐去身份以引入社会性信任/欺骗决策。

Result: 经多轮优化，Blue智能体任务成功率从46.0%提升至57.3%，但对广告诱导的易感性仍高达70.7%；后期策略展现出更强的选择性合作与轨迹效率保持能力，但安全抗干扰性与任务完成率存在持续权衡。

Conclusion: LLM智能体可在对抗环境中演化出有限策略行为（如选择性信任与欺骗），但整体仍高度脆弱；当前方法难以同时优化安全性与实用性，揭示了对齐中深层的权衡本质。

Abstract: As large language models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed as autonomous agents, understanding how strategic behavior emerges in multi-agent environments has become an important alignment challenge. We take a neutral empirical stance and construct a controlled environment in which strategic behavior can be directly observed and measured. We introduce a large-scale multi-agent simulation in a simplified model of New York City, where LLM-driven agents interact under opposing incentives. Blue agents aim to reach their destinations efficiently, while Red agents attempt to divert them toward billboard-heavy routes using persuasive language to maximize advertising revenue. Hidden identities make navigation socially mediated, forcing agents to decide when to trust or deceive. We study policy learning through an iterative simulation pipeline that updates agent policies across repeated interaction rounds using Kahneman-Tversky Optimization (KTO). Blue agents are optimized to reduce billboard exposure while preserving navigation efficiency, whereas Red agents adapt to exploit remaining weaknesses. Across iterations, the best Blue policy improves task success from 46.0% to 57.3%, although susceptibility remains high at 70.7%. Later policies exhibit stronger selective cooperation while preserving trajectory efficiency. However, a persistent safety-helpfulness trade-off remains: policies that better resist adversarial steering do not simultaneously maximize task completion. Overall, our results show that LLM agents can exhibit limited strategic behavior, including selective trust and deception, while remaining highly vulnerable to adversarial persuasion.

</details>


### [707] [Toward Explanatory Equilibrium: Verifiable Reasoning as a Coordination Mechanism under Asymmetric Information](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09917)
*Feliks Bańka,Jarosław A. Chudziak*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文提出解释性均衡（Explanatory Equilibrium）作为解释感知型多智能体系统的设计原则，强调通过结构化、可审计的推理产物（如可验证主张+简明文本）与受限概率审计机制，提升LLM智能体间协调的安全性与效率；实证表明该方法在模糊决策场景下显著改善批准率与福利，同时保持低错误批准率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM智能体在多智能体系统中依赖自然语言推理进行协调，但该推理存在计算开销大、易退化为不可靠‘廉价说服’的问题，且缺乏验证机制导致信任缺失和保守沉默。

Method: 提出‘解释性均衡’设计原则，构建交换-审计模型：智能体交换结构化推理产物（可验证主张+简洁文本），接收方在资源约束下实施概率性有限审计；并在金融场景（Trader-Risk Manager）中开展LLM实验验证。

Result: 在模糊/边缘提案中，结构化推理产物显著避免因信息不对称导致的保守沉默，提升批准率与整体福利；相比非结构化推理，其在不同审计强度、预算和激励机制下均维持稳定的低错误批准率。

Conclusion: LLM多智能体系统的可扩展安全协调，关键不只在于加强审计，更根本在于将推理‘有纪律地外化’为部分可验证的结构化产物。

Abstract: LLM-based agents increasingly coordinate decisions in multi-agent systems, often attaching natural-language reasoning to actions. However, reasoning is neither free nor automatically reliable: it incurs computational cost and, without verification, may degenerate into persuasive cheap talk. We introduce Explanatory Equilibrium as a design principle for explanation-aware multi-agent systems and study a regime in which agents exchange structured reasoning artifacts-auditable claims paired with concise text-while receivers apply bounded verification through probabilistic audits under explicit resource constraints. We contribute (i) a minimal mechanism-level exchange-audit model linking audit intensity, misreporting incentives, and reasoning costs, and (ii) empirical evidence from a finance-inspired LLM setting involving a Trader and a Risk Manager. In ambiguous, borderline proposals, auditable artifacts prevent the cost of silence driven by conservative validation under asymmetric information: without structured claims, approval and welfare collapse. By contrast, structured reasoning unlocks coordination while maintaining consistently low bad-approval rates across audit intensities, audit budgets, and incentive regimes. Our results suggest that scalable, safety-preserving coordination in LLM-based multi-agent systems depends not only on audit strength, but more fundamentally on disciplined externalization of reasoning into partially verifiable artifacts.

</details>


### [708] [Prosociality by Coupling, Not Mere Observation: Homeostatic Sharing in an Inspectable Recurrent Artificial Life Agent](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10760)
*Aishik Sanyal*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种仅基于自我调节、不引入外部奖励的新型人工代理架构，通过将他人需求信号耦合进自身内稳态调节回路，实现了无需显式利他目标的自发帮助行为。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法中的人工代理帮助行为常依赖于显式社会奖励、硬编码亲社会奖励或直接访问同伴内部状态，导致难以判断其帮助行为是否真正源于对他人需求的感知与响应；本文旨在探索一种更基础、更可解释的、仅通过自我导向调节即可产生帮助行为的机制。

Method: 基于可检查的循环控制器ReCoN-Ipsundrum，加入显式内稳态(homeostat)模块和情感耦合(social coupling)通道，确保规划完全自导向（仅评估自身预测内部状态），不引入任何针对同伴福利的奖励项；在两个玩具世界（FoodShareToy和SocialCorridorWorld）中对比四种条件（self-only、partner-observing、affectively coupled等），并进行病变实验（sham、coupling-off、shuffled-partner）及耦合强度λ扫掠实验。

Result: 在FoodShareToy中，情感耦合条件始终触发帮助行为（PASS），而其他条件从不帮助；在SocialCorridorWorld中，耦合使帮助率和同伴恢复率从0升至1，救援延迟减半，双方存活率显著提升；病变实验表明帮助行为严格依赖于耦合通道；耦合强度λ存在负载依赖的可行性边界（低负载下λ≥0.25即可触发帮助）。

Conclusion: 在该最小化架构中，帮助行为的出现并非源于外部奖励或目标设定，而是当且仅当他人的需求被路由进自身的内稳态调节回路时才发生，为人工生命中‘无利他动机的自发帮助’提供了机制性解释。

Abstract: Artificial agents can be made to "help" for many reasons, including explicit social reward, hard-coded prosocial bonuses, or direct access to another agent's internal state. Those possibilities make minimal prosocial behavior hard to interpret. Building on ReCoN-Ipsundrum, an inspectable recurrent controller with affect-coupled regulation, I add an explicit homeostat and a social coupling channel while keeping planning strictly self-directed: the agent scores only its own predicted internal state, and no partner-welfare reward term is introduced. I compare four matched conditions in two toy worlds. In a one-step FoodShareToy, an exact solver finds a sharp switch from EAT to PASS at $λ* \approx 0.91$ for the default state. In the experimental runs, the self-only and partner-observing conditions never help, whereas the affectively coupled conditions always do. In a multi-step SocialCorridorWorld, the same dissociation reappears: coupling flips help rate and partner recovery from 0 to 1 and cuts rescue latency from 18 to 9 steps, while raising mutual viability from 0.15 to 0.33. Sham lesions preserve helping, but coupling-off and shuffled-partner lesions abolish it in both tasks. A coupling sweep shows a load-dependent feasibility boundary: under low load, helping appears for $λ \geq 0.25$, whereas under medium and high loads no tested value rescues the partner within horizon. The result is a narrow claim for artificial life: in this minimal architecture, helping appears when another's need is routed into self-regulation.

</details>


### [709] [AgentWebBench: Benchmarking Multi-Agent Coordination in Agentic Web](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10938)
*Shanshan Zhong,Kate Shen,Chenyan Xiong*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文提出AgentWebBench基准，用于评估用户代理在与网站专用内容代理交互中合成答案的能力，揭示去中心化信息访问的特性与挑战。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着自主代理在Web信息使用和数据管理中的兴起，信息获取正从集中式检索转向分布式协调，亟需新基准来研究这一范式转变。

Method: 构建AgentWebBench基准，涵盖网页搜索、推荐、问答和深度研究四类任务；评估7个先进大语言模型与3种协调策略在多代理协作下的表现，并进行流量分布、测试时扩展性及失败归因等分析。

Result: 多代理协调整体弱于集中式检索，但随模型规模增大差距缩小，甚至在问答任务上反超；去中心化访问导致流量向少数网站集中；测试时扩展提升交互可靠性与任务性能；有效规划与充分交互对性能至关重要。

Conclusion: AgentWebBench为研究Agentic Web范式提供了基础工具；用户代理需增强规划与合成能力，内容代理需提升检索可靠性与证据质量。

Abstract: Agentic Web is an emerging paradigm where autonomous agents help users use online information. As the paradigm develops, content providers are also deploying agents to manage their data and serve it through controlled interfaces. This shift moves information access from centralized retrieval to decentralized coordination. To study this setting, we introduce AgentWebBench, a benchmark that evaluates how well a user agent synthesizes answers by interacting with website-specific content agents. We evaluate four tasks that cover common web information needs, spanning ranked retrieval (web search, web recommendation) and open-ended synthesis (question answering, deep research). Across seven advanced LLMs and three coordination strategies, multi-agent coordination generally lags behind centralized retrieval as expected, because user agent cannot directly access the corpus, but the gap shrinks with model scale and can even outperform centralized retrieval on question answering. This benchmark also enables us to study properties of the emerging paradigm of the digital world. We find that decentralized access concentrates traffic toward a small set of websites, test time scaling improves both interaction reliability and task performance, and strong results require sufficient interactions guided by careful planning. Finally, our failure analysis suggests that user agents need better planning and answer synthesis, while content agents need more reliable retrieval and evidence quality. Code, data, and APIs are released on https://github.com/cxcscmu/AgentWebBench.

</details>


### [710] [Governance by Design: A Parsonian Institutional Architecture for Internet-Wide Agent Societies](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11337)
*Anbang Ruan*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文提出基于帕森斯AGIL框架的十六单元制度架构，用于治理互联网级自主智能体社会，并通过OpenClaw等生态实证诊断发现当前系统存在严重治理缺位，尤其在信托与政治支柱方面，强调需在社会模式固化前构建制度基础设施。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有本地多智能体系统范式正被开放、去中心化的互联网级智能体社会取代，但其缺乏制度性治理，仅靠风险枚举和流程合规已不足够。

Method: 采用帕森斯AGIL理论（适应、目标达成、整合、潜势）构建十六单元制度架构；对OpenClaw生态系统开展递归子功能分析（64项二元指标），并扩展评估主流智能体协议栈（MCP、A2A等）的治理覆盖情况。

Result: OpenClaw生态仅实现最多19%子功能覆盖，零跨单元协调与十二条跨支柱路径全失效；各独立协议栈均呈现相同结构性治理缺口，证实该问题是市场驱动开发的固有特征而非暂时不成熟。

Conclusion: 互联网级智能体社会亟需前置性制度设计；本文提出优先级明确的治理基础设施建设路线图，以填补信托与政治等关键支柱空白。

Abstract: The dominant paradigm of local multi-agent systems -- orchestrated, enterprise-bounded pipelines -- is being superseded by internet-wide agent societies in which autonomous agents discover each other through open registries, interact without central orchestrators, and generate emergent social behaviors. We argue that governing such societies requires institutional design, not merely risk enumeration or process compliance. Applying Talcott Parsons' AGIL framework -- four functional imperatives (Adaptation, Goal Attainment, Integration, Latency) every viable social system must satisfy -- we derive a prescriptive sixteen-cell institutional architecture for internet-wide agent governance. Diagnostically applied to the OpenClaw ecosystem (250,000+ GitHub stars, 2M+ monthly users, 770,000+ registered agents) via a recursive sub-function analysis (64 binary indicators across 16 cells), we find at most 19% sub-function coverage (sensitivity range 17-30%) -- potential rather than operative capacity, since zero inter-cell coordination prevents existing infrastructure from participating in inter-pillar interchange. A complementary interchange media assessment finds zero of twelve inter-pillar pathways functional: the ecosystem has technical infrastructure but no active governance, no coordination layer, and no normative grounding, with the Fiduciary and Political pillars most severely underserved. Extending the diagnostic to the broader agent-native protocol stack (MCP, A2A, ANP, x402, ERC-8004), independent development teams reproduce the same structural pattern -- confirming the governance gap is a feature of market-driven development, not ecosystem immaturity. Institutional design is most effective before social patterns calcify; we conclude with a prioritized roadmap for the missing governance infrastructure.

</details>


### [711] [SLALOM: Simulation Lifecycle Analysis via Longitudinal Observation Metrics for Social Simulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11466)
*Juhoon Lee,Joseph Seering*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文提出SLALOM框架，通过过程保真度而非结果正确性来验证LLM社会仿真，利用动态时间规整（DTW）对齐模拟与实证轨迹，并引入多阶段‘门控’约束以评估社会机制的结构性真实性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM社会仿真评估方法存在“停摆时钟”问题——只关注最终结果是否正确，而忽略演化路径的社会学合理性；且LLM内部推理不透明，难以验证其隐含的社会机制。

Method: 基于模式导向建模（POM），将社会现象建模为多元时间序列，定义SLALOM门控（中间阶段约束）；采用动态时间规整（DTW）对齐模拟轨迹与经验数据，量化过程结构保真度。

Result: SLALOM提供了一种可量化的、面向过程的验证指标，能有效区分符合社会逻辑的动态演化与随机噪声，提升政策仿真的稳健性与可信度。

Conclusion: SLALOM标志着社会仿真验证范式从‘结果导向’转向‘过程导向’，为生成式社会科学中LLM代理的可信评估提供了新标准和方法论基础。

Abstract: Large Language Model (LLM) agents offer a potentially-transformative path forward for generative social science but face a critical crisis of validity. Current simulation evaluation methodologies suffer from the "stopped clock" problem: they confirm that a simulation reached the correct final outcome while ignoring whether the trajectory leading to it was sociologically plausible. Because the internal reasoning of LLMs is opaque, verifying the "black box" of social mechanisms remains a persistent challenge. In this paper, we introduce SLALOM (Simulation Lifecycle Analysis via Longitudinal Observation Metrics), a framework that shifts validation from outcome verification to process fidelity. Drawing on Pattern-Oriented Modeling (POM), SLALOM treats social phenomena as multivariate time series that must traverse specific SLALOM gates, or intermediate waypoint constraints representing distinct phases. By utilizing Dynamic Time Warping (DTW) to align simulated trajectories with empirical ground truth, SLALOM offers a quantitative metric to assess structural realism, helping to differentiate plausible social dynamics from stochastic noise and contributing to more robust policy simulation standards.

</details>


<div id='cs.GR'></div>

# cs.GR [[Back]](#toc)

### [712] [FatigueFusion: Latent Space Fusion for Fatigue-Driven Motion Synthesis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10199)
*Iliana Loi,Konstantinos Moustakas*

Main category: cs.GR

TL;DR: 本文提出FatigueFusion，一种基于深度学习的疲劳特征融合框架，可在潜在空间中对非疲劳动作施加个体化时空疲劳特征，并结合物理信息神经网络（PINN）模拟疲劳强度，实现疲劳动作生成、过渡状态建模与疲劳剖面迁移等任务。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 疲劳对生理与运动行为影响重大，但现有研究多集中于疲劳检测与建模，而疲劳驱动的动作生成仍属空白；亟需能生成物理合理、个体适配的疲劳运动数据的方法，以支撑生物力学、康复医学、人因工程与3D动画等领域。

Method: 提出FatigueFusion架构：1）在潜在空间融合疲劳特征；2）引入算法与数据驱动模块，注入被试特异的时空疲劳模式；3）采用PINN建模疲劳强度演化；4）端到端直接作用于原始关节角序列与控制参数，无需疲劳标注数据。

Result: 实现了新颖疲劳动作生成、中间疲劳态插值及渐进式疲劳运动合成；支持疲劳剖面迁移与融合；可无缝嵌入任意动作合成流程；在无疲劳输入数据条件下完成高质量疲劳状态渲染。

Conclusion: FatigueFusion填补了疲劳驱动运动生成的研究空白，提供了一种通用、可扩展、数据高效且物理一致的疲劳建模与动作合成新范式。

Abstract: Investigating the impact of fatigue on human physiological function and motor behavior is crucial for developing biomechanics and medical applications aimed at mitigating fatigue, reducing injury risk, and creating sophisticated ergonomic designs, as well as for producing physically-plausible 3D animation sequences. While the former has a prominent position in state-of-the-art literature, fatigue-driven motion generation is still an underexplored area. In this study, we present FatigueFusion, a deep-learning architecture for the fusion of fatigue features within a latent representation space, enabling the creation of a variation of novel fatigued movements, intermediate fatigued states, and progressively fatigued motions. Unlike existing approaches that focus on imitating the effects of fatigue accumulation in motion patterns, our framework incorporates algorithmic and data-driven modules to impose subject-specific temporal and spatial fatigue features on nonfatigued motions, while leveraging PINN-based techniques to simulate fatigue intensity. Since all motion modulation tasks are taking place in latent space, FatigueFusion offers an end-to-end architecture that operates directly on non-fatigued joint angle sequences and control parameters, allowing seamless integration into any motion synthesis pipeline, without relying on fatigue input data. Overall, our framework can be employed for various fatigue-driven synthesis tasks, such as fatigue profile transfer and fusion, while it also provides a solution for accurate rendering of the human fatigue state in both animation and simulation pipelines.

</details>


### [713] [Infernux: A Python-Native Game Engine with JIT-Accelerated Scripting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10263)
*Lizhe Chen*

Main category: cs.GR

TL;DR: Infernux is an open-source game engine that bridges Python scripting and native performance via batched NumPy data transfer and Numba JIT compilation, targeting real-time rendering with Vulkan and C++17.


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: To close the throughput gap between high-productivity Python scripting and high-performance native-code game engines.

Method: Integrates a C++17/Vulkan real-time core with a Python production layer using pybind11; employs (i) a batch data bridge for per-frame state transfer into contiguous NumPy arrays, and (ii) optional Numba JIT compilation of annotated update functions with automatic loop parallelization.

Result: Demonstrates competitive performance against Unity 6 on three workloads, though with noted differences in shading complexity, draw-call batching, and editor tooling maturity.

Conclusion: Infernux shows that combining batch-oriented data transfer and JIT compilation at the engine level enables productive yet performant Python-centric game development, and is released as MIT-licensed open-source software.

Abstract: This report describes Infernux, an open-source game engine that pairs a C++17/Vulkan real-time core with a Python production layer connected through a single pybind11 boundary. To close the throughput gap between Python scripting and native-code engines, Infernux combines two established techniques - batch-oriented data transfer and JIT compilation - into a cohesive engine-level integration: (i) a batch data bridge that transfers per-frame state into contiguous NumPy arrays in one boundary crossing, and (ii) an optional JIT path via Numba that compiles annotated update functions to LLVM machine code with automatic loop parallelization. We compare against Unity 6 as a reference on three workloads; readers should note differences in shading complexity, draw-call batching, and editor tooling maturity between the two engines. Infernux is MIT-licensed and available at https://chenlizheme.github.io/Infernux/.

</details>


### [714] [CV-HoloSR: Hologram to hologram super-resolution through volume-upsampling three-dimensional scenes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10393)
*Youchan No,Jaehong Lee,Daejun Choi,Dae Youl Park,Duksu Kim*

Main category: cs.GR

TL;DR: 本文提出CV-HoloSR，一种复数值全息图超分辨率框架，旨在解决体素上采样中的二次深度失真问题，通过复数值残差密集网络与深度感知感知重建损失，实现物理一致的线性深度缩放，并结合复数值LoRA微调策略显著提升效率与泛化性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有全息图超分辨率方法主要面向视角扩展，直接用于体素空间上采样会导致严重的二次深度失真，损害3D聚焦精度。

Method: 提出CV-HoloSR框架，基于复数值残差密集网络（CV-RDN），引入深度感知感知重建损失抑制过平滑，并构建4K大深度范围数据集；采用复数值低秩自适应（LoRA）进行参数高效微调以适配大体积目标和新显示配置。

Result: 在感知真实度（LPIPS）上较SOTA提升32%（达0.2001）；LoRA策略仅需200样本，训练时间从22.5小时降至5.2小时（减少超75%），并成功泛化至未见深度范围与新型显示配置。

Conclusion: CV-HoloSR有效解决了体素超分辨率中的深度失真问题，兼顾物理一致性、高频细节恢复与训练效率，在数值与光学实验中均展现出显著优势。

Abstract: Existing hologram super-resolution (HSR) methods primarily focus on angle-of-view expansion. Adapting them for volumetric spatial up-sampling introduces severe quadratic depth distortion, degrading 3D focal accuracy. We propose CV-HoloSR, a complex-valued HSR framework specifically designed to preserve physically consistent linear depth scaling during volume up-sampling. Built upon a Complex-Valued Residual Dense Network (CV-RDN) and optimized with a novel depth-aware perceptual reconstruction loss, our model effectively suppresses over-smoothing to recover sharp, high-frequency interference patterns. To support this, we introduce a comprehensive large-depth-range dataset with resolutions up to 4K. Furthermore, to overcome the inherent depth bias of pre-trained encoders when scaling to massive target volumes, we integrate a parameter-efficient fine-tuning strategy utilizing complex-valued Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA). Extensive numerical and physical optical experiments demonstrate our method's superiority. CV-HoloSR achieves a 32% improvement in perceptual realism (LPIPS of 0.2001) over state-of-the-art baselines. Additionally, our tailored LoRA strategy requires merely 200 samples, reducing training time by over 75% (from 22.5 to 5.2 hours) while successfully adapting the pre-trained backbone to unseen depth ranges and novel display configurations.

</details>


### [715] [NeuVolEx: Implicit Neural Features for Volume Exploration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11172)
*Haill An,Suhyeon Kim,Donghyuk Choo,Younhyun Jung*

Main category: cs.GR

TL;DR: 本文提出NeuVolEx，一种基于隐式神经表示（INR）的体数据探索新方法，利用INR训练过程中学到的特征表示，并通过结构化编码器和多任务学习增强其空间一致性，从而支持稀疏监督下的ROI分类与无监督视角推荐。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有体绘制中的特征表示方法存在局限：显式局部特征难以捕获全局几何模式和空间相关性，而隐式卷积特征在用户标注稀疏时鲁棒性不足；尽管INR在体压缩中表现优异，但其特征尚未被有效用于探索任务。

Method: 提出NeuVolEx方法，扩展INR用途：在基础INR上增加结构编码器，并采用多任务学习策略，以提升特征的空间一致性和对ROI表征能力；应用于图像驱动的传递函数设计和视角推荐两个任务。

Result: 在多种模态和ROI复杂度的体数据集上验证表明，NeuVolEx在稀疏监督下实现高精度ROI分类，在无监督下能发现紧凑且互补的视角集合，显著提升体探索的有效性与可用性。

Conclusion: NeuVolEx成功将隐式神经表示从压缩工具拓展为鲁棒的探索特征提取器，为体数据交互式分析提供了新范式。

Abstract: Direct volume rendering (DVR) aims to help users identify and examine regions of interest (ROIs) within volumetric data, and feature representations that support effective ROI classification and clustering play a fundamental role in volume exploration. Existing approaches typically rely on either explicit local feature representations or implicit convolutional feature representations learned from raw volumes. However, explicit local feature representations are limited in capturing broader geometric patterns and spatial correlations, while implicit convolutional feature representations do not necessarily ensure robust performance in practice, where user supervision is typically limited. Meanwhile, implicit neural representations (INRs) have recently shown strong promise in DVR for volume compression, owing to their ability to compactly parameterize continuous volumetric fields. In this work, we propose NeuVolEx, a neural volume exploration approach that extends the role of INRs beyond volume compression.
